subject: The Hill: “Did the Supreme Court flip the House by refusing to enforce the Voting Rights Act?”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President
body:
we’re seeing the impact of GOP attacks on voting
|

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56302078/384551196/2067580287?amount=30&refcode=20221222.1a_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc4NTk3NGJjLTU0ODItZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jUSjlmakeXrccHzmMo4JyVTgImSwrdf2VU_4HnXsiuI=)

By historical measures, the 2022 midterm election was _disastrous_ for Republicans. But despite their poor performance, the GOP still managed to just barely flip control of the House of Representatives.

According to some experts, Republicans owe their narrow House majority to the weakening of the Voting Rights Act.
**“Republicans can thank ... Supreme Court justices appointed by Republican presidents ... The election outcome was very likely changed by their Feb. 7, 2022, decision to make it clear that the Voting Rights Act would not be enforced this year to prevent states from using congressional districts drawn in violation of the law.”
– _The Hill_**
---
**Republicans have been working to undermine the Voting Rights Act for _years_ – and now, we’re experiencing the consequences of their efforts. [_Will you pitch in to help the NDRC fight back by working to protect every American’s right to vote?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56302079/384551197/2067580287?amount=30&refcode=20221222.1a_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc4NTk3NGJjLTU0ODItZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jUSjlmakeXrccHzmMo4JyVTgImSwrdf2VU_4HnXsiuI=)**

Don’t forget: In the months following the 2020 election, Republican lawmakers passed _dozens_ of voter suppression bills in states across the country. Now that the GOP has taken control of the House majority, we fully expect them to continue their assault on voting rights at the national level.

**This sustained Republican attack on voting rights threatens the foundations of our democracy – but we’re not powerless against it. As President Obama said, “ Our democracy is resilient as long as we stay engaged and active between elections.”

[_Republicans won’t rest until they’ve fully dismantled the Voting Rights Act. That’s why the NDRC is staying active and engaged in our efforts to defend voting rights. clean_body: we’re seeing the impact of GOP attacks on voting | | = By historical measures, the 2022 midterm election was disastrous for Republicans. But despite their poor performance, the GOP still managed to just barely flip control of the House of Representatives. According to some experts, Republicans owe their narrow House majority to the weakening of the Voting Rights Act. “Republicans can thank ... Supreme Court justices appointed by Republican presidents ... The election outcome was very likely changed by their Feb. 7, 2022, decision to make it clear that the Voting Rights Act would not be enforced this year to prevent states from using congressional districts drawn in violation of the law.” – The Hill Republicans have been working to undermine the Voting Rights Act for years – and now, we’re experiencing the consequences of their efforts. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Don’t forget: In the months following the 2020 election, Republican lawmakers passed dozens of voter suppression bills in states across the country. Now that the GOP has taken control of the House majority, we fully expect them to continue their assault on voting rights at the national level. This sustained Republican attack on voting rights threatens the foundations of our democracy – but we’re not powerless against it. As President Obama said, “ Our democracy is resilient as long as we stay engaged and active between elections.” = — The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 700 13th Street NW, Suite 600 Washington, DC 20005 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

| | I am humbled and proud to share this news with you - it would not have happened without your support! **This morning, my Democratic colleagues in the U.S. House of Representatives chose me to be the top Democrat (the "ranking member") of the House Transportation & Infrastructure Committee.** This is only possible because of your strong support and for that I am very grateful. I am even more proud to share that I am the first person from Washington state to hold this position in Congress. In the next Congress, we will work to protect and build on the successes of the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law and the transportation provisions of the Inflation Reduction Act. **As always, our goal is to create more jobs, support working families, and make our transportation system cleaner, greener, safer, and more accessible.** Thank you again for your support. It means a lot to me, and I am looking forward to working together to make a positive impact for our region and our nation. Stay warm and stay safe! _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | clean_body: | | | | I am humbled and proud to share this news with you - it would not have happened without your support! This morning, my Democratic colleagues in the U.S. House of Representatives chose me to be the top Democrat (the "ranking member") of the House Transportation & Infrastructure Committee. This is only possible because of your strong support and for that I am very grateful. I am even more proud to share that I am the first person from Washington state to hold this position in Congress. In the next Congress, we will work to protect and build on the successes of the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law and the transportation provisions of the Inflation Reduction Act. As always, our goal is to create more jobs, support working families, and make our transportation system cleaner, greener, safer, and more accessible. Thank you again for your support. It means a lot to me, and I am looking forward to working together to make a positive impact for our region and our nation. Stay warm and stay safe! Rick | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen. | This email was sent by . name: Brianna Shamsuddoha
subject: underrated tactic.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
I might be biased, but Michigan is a great example of what happens when voters take initiative.
|
---

Team,
One of our key focuses for 2023 is redistricting reforms -- and I’m not going to lie, I think reforms are underrated. For states with ballot initiatives, it’s one of the most impactful things that voters can do collectively to strengthen democracy.
**Let me tell you a quick story about my home state, Michigan. **Almost ten years ago, the Flint water crisis took the national stage. But it was the culmination of decades of gerrymandered state legislatures ignoring state infrastructure, often at the expense of Black communities.
This time really opened my eyes to the impact of local and state government and I think a lot of Michiganders felt the same way. These collective problems could have felt insurmountable, but instead sparked activism and civic engagement statewide -- not just on access to clean water.
2017 was a boiling point. We were sick of the neglect and elected officials not taking responsibility. A group of Michigan activists called “Voters Not Politicians” proposed a ballot initiative to create an independent redistricting commission. In the 2018 midterm elections, it passed.
In 2021, the citizen commission approved the fairest maps we’ve seen in years -- generations even. And this year, we saw the **_highest midterm turnout in decades_**. Michiganders elected pro-democracy candidates up and down the ballot. They rejected election deniers. And they voted at historic levels to protect reproductive freedom and sent legislators who supported abortion-bans packing.
**This is a HUGE shift in five years.** The dominos fell really quickly since the start of the last midterm election cycle. It’s why I think redistricting reforms are flying under the radar -- there is so much potential for citizen-led change. **[But we need to put things into motion now, we cannot wait until 2030 to start this work and we need your support. Can you chip in a few bucks and help us keep up our work?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56304180/384583627/1275189963?refcode=20221223_AOTL_F_mitimeline_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY2NGUzMmYwLWIwODItZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NI3j9GG79N1Ab8HObOHW0YFUPGZB1ut5oTFdgpKlzi0=)**

Lately, A.G. Holder has been talking a lot about choosing action over apathy. I think there’s a growing feeling that collective action from everyday people really can shift things -- Michigan is the perfect example.
But he also knows that the best way to support activism and grassroots organizing is to address the systemic and institutional barriers we face on the path to change.
Look out for updates from Marco, the AOTL Reform Director, on how to get involved in the new year. [**And if you’re able, consider chipping in a few dollars to our end-of-year fundraising goal. We could use your help!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56304187/384583634/1275189963?refcode=20221223_AOTL_F_mitimeline_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY2NGUzMmYwLWIwODItZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NI3j9GG79N1Ab8HObOHW0YFUPGZB1ut5oTFdgpKlzi0=)
Thanks team,
Brianna Shamsuddoha

clean_body: I might be biased, but Michigan is a great example of what happens when voters take initiative. | Team, One of our key focuses for 2023 is redistricting reforms -- and I’m not going to lie, I think reforms are underrated. For states with ballot initiatives, it’s one of the most impactful things that voters can do collectively to strengthen democracy. Let me tell you a quick story about my home state, Michigan. Almost ten years ago, the Flint water crisis took the national stage. But it was the culmination of decades of gerrymandered state legislatures ignoring state infrastructure, often at the expense of Black communities. This time really opened my eyes to the impact of local and state government and I think a lot of Michiganders felt the same way. These collective problems could have felt insurmountable, but instead sparked activism and civic engagement statewide -- not just on access to clean water. 2017 was a boiling point. We were sick of the neglect and elected officials not taking responsibility. A group of Michigan activists called “Voters Not Politicians” proposed a ballot initiative to create an independent redistricting commission. In the 2018 midterm elections, it passed. In 2021, the citizen commission approved the fairest maps we’ve seen in years -- generations even. And this year, we saw the highest midterm turnout in decades. Michiganders elected pro-democracy candidates up and down the ballot. They rejected election deniers. And they voted at historic levels to protect reproductive freedom and sent legislators who supported abortion-bans packing. This is a HUGE shift in five years. The dominos fell really quickly since the start of the last midterm election cycle. It’s why I think redistricting reforms are flying under the radar -- there is so much potential for citizen-led change. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Lately, A.G. Holder has been talking a lot about choosing action over apathy. I think there’s a growing feeling that collective action from everyday people really can shift things -- Michigan is the perfect example. But he also knows that the best way to support activism and grassroots organizing is to address the systemic and institutional barriers we face on the path to change. Look out for updates from Marco, the AOTL Reform Director, on how to get involved in the new year. = Thanks team, Brianna Shamsuddoha All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. TextFAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. and | = | PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND. Contributions or gifts to The National Redistricting Action Fund are not tax deductible. 700 13th Street NW, Suite 600, Washington, D.C. 20005 This email was sent to:dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zf6fn6bpjhogh6f4bqmdk7l1sen8t0h10u3c1c88_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctiecoj4cdh2bs)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrpjjn7sjq06cgrkomal0lrl6825ji2qbds2et30_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctiecoj4cdh2bs)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zg1ur2d4avttji6vl6dd68c5pqhoob6ge38ue3a8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctiecoj4cdh2bs)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zsfpd1plvnu6isp04dh58uq1gvh0o6318vk94vd8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctiecoj4cdh2bs)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zo5g12ncdb9p22is0ke7eplmtimngiasc3pv75u0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctiecoj4cdh2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zslnpnsc0etsss4scmm4udqmjf2afju8f5ffopgg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctiecoj4cdh2bs)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ziiqh5c4f9tge36kj8gpt1vipdmcrvmhjrvsr1ag_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctiecoj4cdh2bs)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zs8jvaem0gn405nl6b8egim505n89iqjvqertr70_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctiecoj4cdh2bs)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zocn7s0fcig9k62ppfterqn4gf953k7ao146133o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctiecoj4cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zsh69t0lf61nfna6gn6sa29bf9k61oec3hh0dspo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctiecoj4cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zoa05b52niodvbr08el9bumaqh31d0l92gtv7f1o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctiecoj4cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqetgl5mhvpbs7gs8o61ql6mn923jrjskfpi24i0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctiecoj4cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqbt9l6t2nnj15q1dpmhrd0qqan8vel4vamkfimo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctiecoj4cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zdl9fp40r7cha7a39im9h9idu037kr3eqgv5vk30_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctiecoj4cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2mfu53slqsrc5h4j2vcq0t2n0nr8f55tfa3fo2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctiecoj4cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zo5bdbgcvl4qljldo09kmu1r4onpc1i6nsugoo3g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctiecoj4cdh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhlge8kabskvmbi8oi7oh1sg1p19nooejuf7eis0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctiecoj4cdh2bs)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zolvqqllmb413ug6k0989vtlqmn994rcpt218kp8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctiecoj4cdh2bs)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2zt6bs52r2r7l7our0h1m6gqs91bk98dr18l92s1o).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zo593aco5p9qc2ni0ipsjihufu333gfmhsukdisg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctiecoj4cdh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

I 've even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I 'm not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: I can’t close the survey without your response!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Friend,
My team combed through the early responses to my Majority Leader Survey and informed me your response is still missing.
We only asked a handful of our top Patriots to reply and need **100% participation** in order to fully represent our movement.
I'd hate to close the survey without hearing from you, so I'm giving you one final chance to submit your honest feedback. [**Can you submit your response to my Majority Leader Survey before 11:59 PM?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zclrdm1k916e4476n5dcjevebeea8og4u8d1h4ng_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctiecoj4cjh2bs)
I look forward to hearing from you, Friend.
Thank you,
Steve Scalise
_Forwarded Message Below:_
**OFFICIAL MESSAGE FROM MAJORITY LEADER-ELECT STEVE SCALISE**
---
Hey Friend,
I just released my FIRST-EVER [**Majority Leader Survey**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn3jccovc7hk105s2alkee3tasm9hslp5d9108d0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctiecoj4cjh2bs) and I want YOU to be in the first round of Patriots to submit their response.
[**My survey only takes a few minutes to complete, but I need your response by 11:59 PM tonight!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk9ff60g2fm1u0q0npqq0u4o3pnfq6najqb14bag_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctiecoj4cjh2bs) Consider this your opportunity to be open and honest with Congressional leaders.
******[SUBMIT YOUR RESPONSE >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp89jp68u9au5dt02uvdsiebqv9jrc0g3bmrkt58_rp22sh2s8i66pr4ctiecoj4cjh2bs)**
It's critical I get your response before then because I'm meeting with top Republican leaders before our legislative deadline. Without your feedback, I'll be powerless to change our agenda in Washington.
I look forward to reading your response.
Thank you,
Steve Scalise

body:
Friday, December 23rd Edition

---
|
# Weekly Newsletter
---
| December 23rd, 2022 | Issue XLIV
---
| |
---
| | | Senate Democrats Vote for their Own Pay Raise
During yesterday's debate on the Senate Democrats' $32,000 pay raise bill, the Senate Republicans advanced a measure that would cut taxes, curb runaway state spending, and provide much-needed economic relief to struggling New York families, seniors, and small businesses. Shamefully, the Senate Republican amendment was rejected along party lines by Senate Democrats, who moments later voted to raise their annual salary by 29 percent. Senator Rob Ortt and the NYS Republican Conference strongly opposed this measure, stating that it was completely out-of-touch with hardworking taxpayers facing an affordability crisis.
"The State Legislature coming back to Albany to vote on a pay raise for themselves is patently offensive to the people we represent.
It's no secret that the high cost of living and violent crime are the top two issues for New Yorkers. Yet, Albany's One Party Ruling Class continues to put their own misplaced priorities first. Their latest scheme: a whopping $32,000 salary increase and a cap on outside income.
Let's be clear about what this pay raise will do. It will fill the wallets of lawmakers with the tax dollars of hardworking New Yorkers. It will prevent people with real world experience from serving in elected office. And it will create a permanent ruling class of career politicians in our State Capitol.
One thing is for certain: the debate about the massive affordability crisis facing New York is over. By giving themselves a pay raise, Albany's political ruling class is admitting they've made our state unlivable if you make less than $142,000.
The taxpayers shouldn't forget," said Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt.
---
---
| | |
### NYS Republican Leader Rob Ortt Urges Common Sense Climate Policies

Republican Senator and Industry Professional Call for Common Sense Following Release of Albany Climate Action Council's Final "Scoping Plan"
This week, New York State Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt and Gavin Donohue, President and CEO, Independent Power Producers of New York reiterated calls for common-sense climate policies, following the release of the Climate Action Council's (CAC) Final "Scoping Plan." This radical energy agenda could have devastating consequences for energy consumers, the electric grid, and the entire state economy.

It will fill the wallets of lawmakers with the tax dollars of hardworking New Yorkers. It will prevent people with real world experience from serving in elected office. And it will create a permanent ruling class of career politicians in our State Capitol. One thing is for certain: the debate about the massive affordability crisis facing New York is over. By giving themselves a pay raise, Albany's political ruling class is admitting they've made our state unlivable if you make less than $142,000. The taxpayers shouldn't forget," said Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt. | | | NYS Republican Leader Rob Ortt Urges Common Sense Climate Policies Republican Senator and Industry Professional Call for Common Sense Following Release of Albany Climate Action Council's Final "Scoping Plan" This week, New York State Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt and Gavin Donohue, President and CEO, Independent Power Producers of New York reiterated calls for common-sense climate policies, following the release of the Climate Action Council's (CAC) Final "Scoping Plan." Friend,

Steve Scalise

It’s critical I get your response before then because I’m meeting with top Republican leaders before our legislative deadline. Without your feedback, I’ll be powerless to change our agenda in Washington.
I look forward to reading your response.
Thank you,
Steve Scalise

name: Dr. Frank Turek, CrossExamined.org
subject: Help these students keep their Christian faith
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
Friend, You can be the reason that thousands of young people -- facing constant attacks from "Woke" culture and the atheistic positions of left-wing professors -- stay firm in their Christian faith. [**Can I count on your support of CrossExamined.org's non-profit Christian ministry to help us reach 9,000+ MORE college students at live, on-campus events in the upcoming year?**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.) Since 2006, CrossExamined.org has offered our dynamic I Don't Have Enough Faith to Be An Atheist seminars at high schools, college campuses, and churches. At these special -- and often life-changing -- seminars, I tackle the four major questions that establish why Christianity is the most reasonable worldview, and I also offer an open mic for students to ask me anything. _For many young Christians, this CrossExamined.org event may be the FIRST defense of their faith that they've heard not just at their school, but in their lives! For others, like the atheist students who often show up, it may be their ONLY exposure to Christian apologetics._ [**Please make your most generous gift to support CrossExamined.org's non-profit Christian ministry right now. Until December 31, your gift will be DOUBLED thanks to a generous supporter, up to $150,000 total, so your support will have TWICE the impact.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
[ Make my double-impact gift](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
This year, I visited 13 colleges and reached 4,500+ students in-person. Of course, CrossExamined.org also reached _hundreds of thousands more people_ by live-streaming these events and posting short clips from the events on YouTube. **The testimonials that my CrossExamined.org team and I receive after these student-focused events is humbling -- and these stories show why your support is so important:** "**Everybody made me feel stupid for believing in God ever since I got in college**. [...] I have been praying for months for God to strengthen my faith because I didn't want to leave Him, I didn't want to live life without Him, and I didn't know how it'll be like. And God used you guys and Dr. Turek to give me back my faith, so thank you so much." "I saw Frank Turek at SUNY Albany the past two nights, and I really just wanted to thank him. [...] His presentation really inspired me to attend church, and I actually plan on attending my local youth church tonight. [...] And it helps that **I can now intelligently debate my atheist history teacher**. Thanks so much! **Friend, with your help, I believe that we can reach 9,000+ MORE students with CrossExamined.org's powerful youth seminars in the upcoming year ... but I must know if I can count on YOUR help today.** Thanks to our special year-end matching gift challenge, every $1.25 (plus match!) that CrossExamined.org can raise will help us reach ONE MORE STUDENT in the upcoming year.
---
[Reach 20 students ($25 + MATCH) ](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._M7oIxHvl_mCQ)
---
[Reach 30 students ($37.50 + MATCH)](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
[Reach 50 students ($62.50 + MATCH)](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
[Help with any amount](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-Xcg)
---
Currently, three out of four Christian-raised teens walk away from the church after they leave home, most often due to being intellectually unprepared to defend their faith when faced by the hostility of anti-faith and "Woke" culture at schools. With your support, we can reverse this alarming trend -- now referred to as the "youth exodus" -- from the church. [**Please make your MATCHED gift of $25 to help us reach 20 students ... your gift of $37.50 to help us reach 30 students ... your gift of $62.50 to help us reach 50 students ... or your gift of ANY amount in support.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-Q) Thank you and God bless,
---
Dr. Frank TurekPresidentCrossExamined.org
---
[Support CrossExamined.org](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---

---
P.O. Box 523692, Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMzU3LTViZjM5ZmNlMThlNTQ3MmNhNjRjOWRjNDFhYzFhOWQzIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/7dS6itQ20m77bxw30U1P2Q) to unsubscribe.
---

name: Majority Leader-elect Steve Scalise
subject: I can’t close the survey without your response!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Friend,
My team combed through the early responses to my Majority Leader Survey and informed me your response is still missing.
We only asked a handful of our top Patriots to reply and need **100% participation** in order to fully represent our movement.
I’d hate to close the survey without hearing from you, so I’m giving you one final chance to submit your honest feedback. [**Can you submit your response to my Majority Leader Survey before 11:59 PM?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77411%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gZ01eSHm2bKGNPuaYbbfrg&sysid=1)
I look forward to hearing from you, Friend.
Thank you,
Steve Scalise
_Forwarded Message Below:_
**OFFICIAL MESSAGE FROM MAJORITY LEADER-ELECT STEVE SCALISE**
---
Hey Friend,
I just released my FIRST-EVER [**Majority Leader Survey**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77412%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=f3HkS1zqIcM%2bkIT97l8vPw&sysid=1) and I want YOU to be in the first round of Patriots to submit their response.
[**My survey only takes a few minutes to complete, but I need your response by 11:59 PM tonight!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77413%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3dlw%2bM0NMN%2bMIVNqrcUFKw&sysid=1) Consider this your opportunity to be open and honest with Congressional leaders.
******[SUBMIT YOUR RESPONSE >>](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77414%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=a3acAhNKn1ybt9mgIG8AYg&sysid=1)**
It’s critical I get your response before then because I’m meeting with top Republican leaders before our legislative deadline. Without your feedback, I’ll be powerless to change our agenda in Washington.
I look forward to reading your response.
Thank you,
Steve Scalise
Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. 320 First Street SE, Washington, DC 20003

My team combed through the early responses to my Majority Leader Survey and informed me your response is still missing.
We only asked a handful of our top Patriots to reply and need **100% participation** in order to fully represent our movement.
I'd hate to close the survey without hearing from you, so I'm giving you one final chance to submit your honest feedback. [**Can you submit your response to my Majority Leader Survey before 11:59 PM?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zerbepllbar97r5koqv5ppelkp5dimbdcu2hf2o0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c3g62o36cph2bs)
I look forward to hearing from you, Friend.
Thank you,
Steve Scalise

The Fake News is lying.

**The law is on our side.**

I’ve filed one of the **STRONGEST** and **LARGEST** election lawsuits in history to get answers for the rigged and corrupt electoral disaster that has shocked this great nation.

**If the process was illegitimate, Then so are the results.**

Every day, more whistleblowers are coming forth, giving us their support. We must hold the line until our lawsuit shows the TRUTH to the American people.

[**That’s why I’m asking for your support.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7tniv8khnbp305g068n0g6qaphrgjsfchpom4fo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c3g6ao74cdh2bs)

name: President Obama
subject: Future elections
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
We need to continue setting higher and higher bars.
|
---

Friend,

Our democracy is resilient, as long as we stay engaged.

We saw that engagement during the last election, when a majority of voters cast their ballots with fair maps -- some for the first time in decades. In Colorado and Michigan, voters passed redistricting reforms. In Pennsylvania, citizens proposed a fair map in court. Across the country, from North Carolina to Kansas, people spoke up in public hearings on behalf of their communities. All of this helped ensure that maps were more fair than before.

But as important as it is to stay engaged around elections, it’s even more important to stay engaged between elections. That’s because the next phase of redistricting is underway and will have consequential impacts on the 2024 elections.

**[Will you make an end-of-year donation to All On The Line? Your support will help them engage voters, mobilize activists, and continue to champion voting rights in 2023.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56317565/384618686/1275189963?refcode=20221223_AOTL_P_BHO_2_ActivesxOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdkZDVmNDdjLWQyODItZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5n0KypCnnxGQ_ZQFUoJfJi4et3dWV3EM7tnbt5EJrHQ=)**

Decisions by the U.S. Supreme Court allowed Alabama, Georgia, and Louisiana to hold their 2022 midterm elections with maps that were deemed _illegal_ by lower courts. As a result, millions of voters cast their ballots under gerrymandered maps, some of which violate the Voting Rights Act.

Communities of color were especially impacted by the Supreme Court’s failure to intervene. So while we’ve made progress, we have a lot further to go. We need to continue setting higher standards for the “fairest maps in decades” every time new maps are drawn.

**[Friend, will you make a donation to support All On The Line?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56317572/384618693/1275189963?refcode=20221223_AOTL_P_BHO_2_ActivesxOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdkZDVmNDdjLWQyODItZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5n0KypCnnxGQ_ZQFUoJfJi4et3dWV3EM7tnbt5EJrHQ=)**

I am a strong believer that progress doesn’t happen on its own. This movement is proof of that. Whether it was demanding affordable health care or paving the way for federal marriage rights, people like you have always led the way on progress. You’ve kept us marching forward, toward the promise of a better future.

We’re not there yet. But we’re a lot closer thanks to the persistence of voters, activists, and community leaders like you.

Thank you for everything you do,
Barack Obama

body:
Happy Holidays from the Gillibrand Family

Dear family and friends:

Wishing you and your loved ones many blessings and much happiness this year!

We celebrated Theo’s graduation from high school and Henry's graduation from the 8th grade this year. Both boys are thriving in their new schools. Jonathan and I are busy at work trying to make a difference every day.

We are grateful for your love encouragement and friendship. May this holiday season bring you peace joy and much love.

With love and gratitude,

Kirsten, Jonathan, Theo, Henry and Maple

If you agree a CONSERVATIVE should lead us in Washington... not another RINO Establishment hack like McCarthy...**[I need you to help us mount a pressure campaign over the next 4 weeks.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2qkgvtvfgo32oqs8iuum4d7us3dnl653pfjnmlg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c3g69ob2c1h2bs)**

**Kevin McCarthy does NOT have the values, the backbone, or the courage** to stand up to Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer.

Like most Establishment Republicans, he sees conservative voters like you and me as the real enemy...and he’ll stab us in the back every chance he gets.

For 2 years, I served as Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus... the most powerful and successful congressional bloc of conservatives ever. **I figured out exactly how the Establishment operates and exactly how to defeat them at their own game.**

I’ll make you this promise right now: I will NEVER betray conservative voters, surrender my principles, or stop fighting for what matters most.

We won the House in November because the American people voted to STOP Biden’s radicalism and BREAK the Establishment’s stranglehold on this nation. **McCarthy won’t fight for us...so we’ve got to do it ourselves.**

But we only have a couple weeks before Congress picks our new Speaker. **[We need you to LEAD this fight and power our pressure campaign.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z5o29dc4nn2rgbhede1ra6rnq5nf8qnhe04dnfc0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c3g69ob2c1h2bs)**

My efforts to win over Congress are FAR more powerful if they know that VOTERS want a conservative in charge. | | | | Kevin McCarthy does NOT have the values, the backbone, or the courage to stand up to Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer. Like most Establishment Republicans, he sees conservative voters like you and me as the real enemy...and he’ll stab us in the back every chance he gets. For 2 years, I served as Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus... the most powerful and successful congressional bloc of conservatives ever. I figured out exactly how the Establishment operates and exactly how to defeat them at their own game. I’ll make you this promise right now: I will NEVER betray conservative voters, surrender my principles, or stop fighting for what matters most. We won the House in November because the American people voted to STOP Biden’s radicalism and BREAK the Establishment’s stranglehold on this nation. McCarthy won’t fight for us...so we’ve got to do it ourselves. But we only have a couple weeks before Congress picks our new Speaker. | | | | | | | | | Yours in Freedom, Andy Biggs Republican Congressman, AZ-5 | | | | Paid for by Biggs for Congress If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Your America
subject: You can help restore hope in our country
body:
You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 education. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7689%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=KigZfG2mYe01xUfbE%2bLb1A&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98086%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RlfYdgIsC6y0RkxFoXdhJA&sysid=1) Fellow American, [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98086%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RlfYdgIsC6y0RkxFoXdhJA&sysid=1) You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope. Instead, we must fight back with the truth. Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. That’s why we’ve turned our course, [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98087%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=U5p1sUJXErx%2bvqk4YZP06g&sysid=1) into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy. Taught by historian Wilfred McClay and based on his recently published history of America, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Hillsdale’s goal in producing this course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism --especially among our young people--that is essential to preserving free government.** **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project,” which is injecting the idea that America is an essentially unjust nation into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Please consider getting [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98087%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=U5p1sUJXErx%2bvqk4YZP06g&sysid=1) as a DVD set for your home library or to give as a gift. Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty. Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98088%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YlG99eYRpYe40ok5KMLtmQ&sysid=1) Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and your support of its mission on behalf of liberty. Sincerely, Bill Gray Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Happy Holidays from the Murphys
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy Democrats
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/aR0y0T-JTWBz-jiTDSo2j9nRMOkhoBaIEBPtnjeBi6s=/1izq2IFXVFecWb2l00av4T45vzaRbW08jhK3na4rQwI=)
Peter,

The Eagles are 13-1, the Phillies made the World Series & Army beat Navy! As we celebrate the holidays with friends and family, let's remember & pray for the 150,000 American troops currently serving away from home, including those in Poland putting pressure on Russia after their invasion of the Ukraine. Hope you have a Happy Holidays and blessed New Year! Thank you for all of your support & friendship. We wish you a happy and healthy 2023!

Patrick, Maggie (16), and Jack (13)

Paid for by Kennedy Democrats

name: Mike Pence
subject: It’s called CHRISTmas for a reason
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Advancing American Freedom Inc |
body:
Too many Americans forget the real reason for the season. | | | Please see a note from our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe, please visit this _[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=604e3313ab9946a5bc9db93118e2954e&_t=jtU9p6Lx_0H-2fMBxKZJ2MIldkAMrwklzHYRuuLoPmitlZQpOF9c_PEoVPQa06DwG1SaNYYjBG4t0i5UemdbUlbTvVXpZF2Xf5W2ZHub4Ag%3D)_.
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=604e3313ab9946a5bc9db93118e2954e&_e=iT7Xdfzo1s8KxqeHXn6ECIUQFQ0o9CpPsUjy8nowtRC8nS5BnGi9JlJKm2GBQQEJb1FS6RtFqaHXheu2c6QOZ-poAGz_BcuSnwqeRFE5P2UOJvt3XCLDvFKiNA9xyzCyJXJB9_SkC1_KwE5Xvd1szoqtoA5nALAdilD1IHWAamGYn72zvDmPcoIMm04mGesl5-SO_FWMjxuwT7eTPk8hUQB0BKiYJd0maeicwPCO2YRziAAn7xRYUOasM5_2vBNb1C7zPnTs_z7mn4qAXkm6sRDhgXScZ2K7xtusEL0joaXp4G43aIHYyfvhmY9S55npyq_Wbgzuoy07BdwoDMM2HAS0bcUXNbznIUXO1KOQbZ4pijo_7BfmeC6zEXdkFru8feF4xUv00Qwap-tmg4anuA%3D%3D)
---
| | Peter,
Many will _[**have you believe**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=604e3313ab9946a5bc9db93118e2954e&_e=iT7Xdfzo1s8KxqeHXn6ECIUQFQ0o9CpPsUjy8nowtRC8nS5BnGi9JlJKm2GBQQEJb1FS6RtFqaHXheu2c6QOZ-poAGz_BcuSnwqeRFE5P2UOJvt3XCLDvFKiNA9xyzCyJXJB9_SkC1_KwE5Xvd1szoqtoA5nALAdilD1IHWAamGYn72zvDmPcoIMm04mGesl5-SO_FWMjxuwT7eTPk8hUQB0BKiYJd0maeicwPCO2YRziAAn7xRYUOasM5_2vBNbIM8NQ6X62FnNeEnyvVr6zJk1kivkPps6jXgOMtD03q6KpI9d0eVVEe36MQfahvaT_QBTvsNRfTIwp8xJMS36jPQpUJVuWtyeB3QHOY_iZ5RX-BHnqOOAUl6AfJkLNvFTvj2Sy5uFiplj_PmUPds0sw%3D%3D)_ Christmas is about Santa, snowmen, candy canes, and presents – _but it’s not._ **Christmas is a time for Christians to come together and rejoice in Our Savior’s birth!**
---
As people of faith, you and I both know our _greatest blessings_ come from our Creator, and because of Him, we have freedom and prosperity. **Peter, at a time when religious liberty is under attack, Christians in America should stand** _**proudly**_**in their faith. **_[**I AGREE >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=604e3313ab9946a5bc9db93118e2954e&_e=iT7Xdfzo1s8KxqeHXn6ECIUQFQ0o9CpPsUjy8nowtRC8nS5BnGi9JlJKm2GBQQEJb1FS6RtFqaHXheu2c6QOZ-poAGz_BcuSnwqeRFE5P2UOJvt3XCLDvFKiNA9xyzCyJXJB9_SkC1_KwE5Xvd1szoqtoA5nALAdilD1IHWAamGYn72zvDmPcoIMm04mGesl5-SO_FWMjxuwT7eTPk8hUQB0BKiYJd0maeicwPCO2YRziAAn7xRYUOasM5_2vBNbZsH7dsxkFa0aZBgaZSRQ3sLPD9FFfuy87D_sqv-SSPNm3QTXqGg7U1zCVQdcixjvSZNI5onpJnaGxJPganletxGxaw1BxNdvr8riWWm8h6oa9zK9r82CB03Ah7C2OhcPLC8yhJ7Syh-rl9g5KOwj9g%3D%3D)_
---
[**WALK IN FAITH**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=604e3313ab9946a5bc9db93118e2954e&_e=iT7Xdfzo1s8KxqeHXn6ECIUQFQ0o9CpPsUjy8nowtRC8nS5BnGi9JlJKm2GBQQEJb1FS6RtFqaHXheu2c6QOZ-poAGz_BcuSnwqeRFE5P2UOJvt3XCLDvFKiNA9xyzCyJXJB9_SkC1_KwE5Xvd1szoqtoA5nALAdilD1IHWAamGYn72zvDmPcoIMm04mGesl5-SO_FWMjxuwT7eTPk8hUQB0BKiYJd0maeicwPCO2YRziAAn7xRYUOasM5_2vBNbb0YTkALj4EZSgkgu6Ztgaf4XOP420DT1dJmQ0bH7wufzil-BJbIKW3RXKu3tPPfqtZm1sfs8WWiQYGEWeWHHfYF4ZPymcqlHW9Gm69LLVo7P4KTWJgiGPOp_df2DsHjOAew-Z0a0aPTSLvInotw-bA%3D%3D)
---
The Left has tried to snuff out our faith in Him by shuttering our churches, firebombing our pregnancy centers, and brainwashing our children in school. **But we can’t back down from this spiritual fight, Peter.** The America we know and love is in bad shape, and only God can save us – but we can have a critical hand in saving our nation. _[**I AGREE >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=604e3313ab9946a5bc9db93118e2954e&_e=iT7Xdfzo1s8KxqeHXn6ECIUQFQ0o9CpPsUjy8nowtRC8nS5BnGi9JlJKm2GBQQEJb1FS6RtFqaHXheu2c6QOZ-poAGz_BcuSnwqeRFE5P2UOJvt3XCLDvFKiNA9xyzCyJXJB9_SkC1_KwE5Xvd1szoqtoA5nALAdilD1IHWAamGYn72zvDmPcoIMm04mGesl5-SO_FWMjxuwT7eTPk8hUQB0BKiYJd0maeicwPCO2YRziAAn7xRYUOasM5_2vBNbdKZ8B9hENqr2URhAYsfoUzTdxgVHd31bVfk5fWKlcesmHcIwuqXryQ9I-uKmZEec5p4TUYBfge6irCCJzYZp1ozElvpSHbngH6umMg0ea3zS4smHksNOwWtALWphErf8A8pUo0TzQn9gfaYmylUSAQ%3D%3D)_ **Peter, it’s time for all God-fearing Americans to pray and act to save our freedom while we still have the opportunity. ** **_[Make a critical contribution to help Advancing American Freedom defend religious liberty right here in America – right now.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=604e3313ab9946a5bc9db93118e2954e&_e=iT7Xdfzo1s8KxqeHXn6ECIUQFQ0o9CpPsUjy8nowtRC8nS5BnGi9JlJKm2GBQQEJb1FS6RtFqaHXheu2c6QOZ-poAGz_BcuSnwqeRFE5P2UOJvt3XCLDvFKiNA9xyzCyJXJB9_SkC1_KwE5Xvd1szoqtoA5nALAdilD1IHWAamGYn72zvDmPcoIMm04mGesl5-SO_FWMjxuwT7eTPk8hUQB0BKiYJd0maeicwPCO2YRziAAn7xRYUOasM5_2vBNbh8VBfOHY3155cEmZVDaor6kGiMi06KziSW8s0p99PLhxCfhNDFYmjhS7CFfN9dfhEn3x1_c8R5Hj-KOz0lLRBjXaK4kiV5TS4ogjM-B9ey21y4yKnYvKWRBoCYCbi57HMJvap5fV8KazrL1krQI5pw%3D%3D)_ **

clean_body: Too many Americans forget the real reason for the season. | | | Please see a note from our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe, please visit this . | | Peter, Many will Christmas is about Santa, snowmen, candy canes, and presents – but it’s not. Christmas is a time for Christians to come together and rejoice in Our Savior’s birth! As people of faith, you and I both know our greatest blessings come from our Creator, and because of Him, we have freedom and prosperity. Peter, at a time when religious liberty is under attack, Christians in America should stand proudlyin their faith. The Left has tried to snuff out our faith in Him by shuttering our churches, firebombing our pregnancy centers, and brainwashing our children in school. But we can’t back down from this spiritual fight, Peter. The America we know and love is in bad shape, and only God can save us – but we can have a critical hand in saving our nation. Peter, it’s time for all God-fearing Americans to pray and act to save our freedom while we still have the opportunity. With your help, we can defend religious liberty and keep Christ in CHRISTmas. God Bless, Mike PenceFormer Vice PresidentFounder, Advancing American Freedom | | . | | | | | | Paid for by Advancing American Freedom Inc | | P.O. Box 26352 Alexandria, Virginia 22313 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com |

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023?
body:
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d46efcf89daa4d4cb706c4fa86c12e8f&_e=5LnB6-mtofBmDJItXRlY5UdQotaovo2nMA663CfeS01eK0hrEeNLKHi-eaSNji04w81rmqkCmDoyJ4AoZW0ZBVNsQ-L5FwYpP7ul5Ys2LFSoHq4YXKPX5mBBKl04B9G_LQoQmwYGKmPQnBDdIItp3u50ACFc017j-XDhB9UTqWbjPz4OQyMTgFI7h8gk2k7ekj1Kh4W4Qz17d_jlXLE3wve7vFVUY-FNJ9vycn9ye6wJvjhUIrqT7awcn68pNi87SMUxe-0zAfSjy0VIF8qUZuFTVp72zCLPeXZfoO6RvsKrRjIPybL1BdDpJdkDmCG4BRZhDLW-EnikzIjd9iobGmamY25kiJzhIc_TsI5xT1Y8ySMlc7U7mKpv_ym28Yy9)
---
Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That's why I've written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we'll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* From January to February, we'll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we'll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we'll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we'll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---
[Request your 2023 Daily Devotional](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d46efcf89daa4d4cb706c4fa86c12e8f&_e=5LnB6-mtofBmDJItXRlY5UdQotaovo2nMA663CfeS01eK0hrEeNLKHi-eaSNji04w81rmqkCmDoyJ4AoZW0ZBVNsQ-L5FwYpP7ul5Ys2LFSoHq4YXKPX5mBBKl04B9G_LQoQmwYGKmPQnBDdIItp3u50ACFc017j-XDhB9UTqWbjPz4OQyMTgFI7h8gk2k7ekj1Kh4W4Qz17d_jlXLE3wve7vFVUY-FNJ9vycn9ye6w213MkwNc-Bq1kdpmy4ZlHbz7YtIQihfUDqYpkTy1QtLJ09Kdahr2lJbpAv50DslWZjo0Pk2ovC8MDcp0Ehn8ztGgz7VeqNnst_vslZz1PRfqfE15qXUYIOzWOW6SM1ndga75mUYqlxOewBbQ-LpFU)

---

name: Trudy Busch Valentine
subject: Thank you, Missouri
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate
body:
| | |
---
As I traveled the state campaigning for U.S. Senate, I promised people everywhere that I would always be open and honest and that they would always know where I stand on issues that matter. And even though I am no longer a candidate for public office, that’s still a promise I will keep.
For me, the holidays have always been a time to reflect on the people and things I am most grateful for in my life. But this year especially, and now that the dust has settled a bit, I’ve been giving considerable thought to our campaign and the issues we ran on – and what it means for the future of Missouri.
To the people who voted for me – and even the people who didn’t – I think it’s easy sometimes to look at the results and feel defeated and hopeless. Like your voices weren’t heard or don’t matter. Like it’s somehow impossible to win in what’s become a frustratingly red state when in reality, it’s the Democrats who continue to deliver solutions for the American people.
Trust me, this isn’t the outcome my team and I wanted – and it hasn’t always been easy to accept. We were keenly aware of the obstacles we were up against. But to me, success doesn’t only have to mean winning your individual race. Together, we made progress for Missouri and accomplished a lot for which we should feel proud.
For instance, our campaign helped flip multiple legislative seats by working closely with down-ballot candidates across the state. We built a diverse coalition of support across party, racial, and socioeconomic lines that helped us outperform previous statewide Democratic candidates, including President Biden, in nearly every county. We implemented an aggressive field strategy that resulted in direct contact with hundreds of thousands of voters. And we raised awareness about critical issues like a woman’s freedom to choose, foreign ownership of American farmland, lowering the costs of basic necessities like healthcare and prescription drugs, and increasing access to mental healthcare and addiction treatment.
I strongly believe that these things matter. These are tangible results that we can point to today to help establish a foundation and framework for another candidate and their campaign tomorrow. I still see plenty of reasons to feel hopeful because lasting, meaningful change doesn’t happen overnight or in a single election. It takes considerable time, effort, and resources – and a steadfast commitment to showing up and doing all the unglamourous work that’s required of us to build a stronger, safer, more inclusive Missouri for everyone.
That means we must continue to hold our elected leaders accountable for their words and their actions. That means we must continue to call out bigotry, racism, homophobia, and all forms of discrimination without hesitation. That means we must continue to reject extremism on both sides of the aisle. That means we must continue to put partisan politics aside and put people first. That means we must continue to stand up for our basic civil liberties and freedoms. And without question, that means we must continue to defend and protect our democracy with everything we’ve got.
And in case there is any doubt, no, I’m not giving up on these worthy fights. As a nurse, widowed mother of six, and a grandmother, I ran for U.S. Senate to listen to people and to open my heart and mind to their challenges and struggles to try and make a difference. And it was the greatest honor of my life. I remain in awe of the resounding message nearly one million Missourians sent with their votes on Election Day. Thank you from the bottom of my heart. You taught me so much and trusted me to carry forward your hopes, fears, and dreams. For that, I’ll be forever grateful.
Because of you, we chose truth over fear. We chose compassion over hate. We chose acceptance over intolerance. We chose integrity over dishonesty. And we chose unity over division. That’s the Missouri I know and love and have been proud to call home my entire life. And that’s the Missouri I know we can be.
Thank you,
Trudy
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/5sNAQQN7RUy0KByOPWpWlQ2?unsubscribedata=kKTiOkn9SmhxNp7X6j%2BHBENBgRzL2JxZLUgQo2XXU0UcPn99Mc4DD3BOUJIdCheYxEHGM%2BrPIOksbKqF768zEtZy8hErG2SEJjZTmyTHq2xNaR%2FP5hDYbyPffwpj0865I5K0oOVksmzTHmA0fD%2F80BPIUcVs%2BE5Xpm6hI9kCkQvhcW1WbM9ZmKO7uDwuSeCuK6W0LsMsSrs4hi6pLrBoY6c46lRCOhUSoEEiB018YTe9IrPNxiVlggUGM3VqEcq02E%2B4rXf0AIjL5YxiMrWudzouglcNPlKMGGDYdKalNCBVT%2Br5TIZ%2FLL00HrSPteWCb6pMgIo2bsS0inOfEQ5wyKxipyfp%2FmLcY%2Bi%2FeeUAyRm7gsoR8HezW4suGfQAW1XTMGnsgqaKyCotDPYtP9i1GQA5gQtPjGqpfQXCihRcioM%3D) Contributions to Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate are not tax deductible. | | 2022 | Paid for by Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate

name: Brad Phillips, Persecution Project Foundation
subject: Will you help this Christian family?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._YpioBGSI0RMjgsBkmA)
---
Friend, We've got the airplane ready ... but we can't fill it without your help. **This Christmas season, the Persecution Project is preparing to airlift emergency relief supplies for 2,000 persecuted Christian families in the war-torn Nuba Mountains of Sudan.** [Can I count on your help to bless our brothers and sisters in Christ this holiday season? With a generous gift of $75, you can provide relief supplies to one Christian family displaced by war ... for $150, two Christian families ... and so on.](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
[Support the Emergency Christmas Airlift](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
[](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._1hk8knotD1dn6QoxIg)
---
"All who desire to live godly in Christ Jesus will be persecuted." -- 2 Timothy 3:12
---
**Friend, the Nuba Mountains are home to Sudan's largest Christian community ... and today, that community is fighting for their survival.** Radical Islamists that control the government have kept the Nuba Mountains under a humanitarian blockade since 2011. They've targeted Christians and other political and religious dissidents in Sudan for increased persecution. _And in recent weeks, the Islamist government has launched new ground attacks in the Nuba Mountains, displacing at least 7,000 more families from a place called Western Jebel._ With the help of generous believers like you, the Persecution Project has worked with the Nuba church to bring tons (literal tons!) of crisis relief supplies to persecuted Christians in the region for more than 10 years. **But now, with increasingly dire conditions on the ground, our emergency relief efforts are more urgently needed than ever ... and our Nuba church partners have asked if we can do _even more_ this holiday season.**
---
[](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._4LrcTdoF_zu0QFBElg)
---
"Suppose a brother or sister is without clothes and daily food. If one of you says to him, "Go, I wish you well; keep warm and well fed,' but does nothing about his physical needs, what good is it? In the same way, faith by itself, if it is not accompanied by action, is dead." -- James 2:15-17 [**Will you help the Persecution Project and our partners in the Nuba church deliver emergency relief supplies to 2,000 persecuted Christian families this Christmas?**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.) Your gift of $75 will provide supplies for one family, but truly, **any amount** you can give will help us load the next plane!
---
[Support 1 Christian family ($75)](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
[Support 2 Christian families ($150)](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
[Support 3 Christian families ($225)](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
[Provide any amount of relief](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
With your gift today, the Persecution Project can fully supply our Emergency Christmas Airlift so that our local church partners in the Nuba Mountains can deliver urgently-needed supplies -- and a powerful witness of God's love and Christian compassion -- to 2,000 Christian families in need. For every $75 we raise, we can prepare a full emergency relief kit for one family, with items like food, cooking pots, blankets, mosquito netting, and heavy-duty tarps to serve as emergency shelter. [**Please, Friend -- can I count on you to make your most generous gift in support of the Persecution Project's Emergency Christmas Airlift now?**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMzU3LTYzZTg3ZmM0ZmNkMDQ1YjdiMDVjOTc5MGJhMzdhZGY1IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEwIiwidW4iOiIiLCJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9pbnRlcmxhbmQzLmRvbm9ycGVyZmVjdC5uZXQvd2VibGluay9XZWJMaW5rLmFzcHg_bmFtZT1FMjU0MDA5JmlkPTE0In0/bbLn1NifJ09C04yMUcPORQ)
---
[ Support the Emergency Christmas Airlift](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMzU3LTYzZTg3ZmM0ZmNkMDQ1YjdiMDVjOTc5MGJhMzdhZGY1IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjExIiwidW4iOiIiLCJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9pbnRlcmxhbmQzLmRvbm9ycGVyZmVjdC5uZXQvd2VibGluay9XZWJMaW5rLmFzcHg_bmFtZT1FMjU0MDA5JmlkPTE0In0/vA9vu7Y3hq4yp0u3z4rLDQ)
---
A humanitarian relief flight is the only safe way we can deliver supplies to the Nuba Mountains, which are both geographically remote and underdeveloped due to the ongoing blockade by radical Islamist forces. _But we need to act fast to serve the thousands of Nuba families recently displaced by new fighting._ Persecuted Christian families in the Nuba Mountains need our help now, which is why I'm writing to you today. clean_body: | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. | | | | Friend, We've got the airplane ready ... but we can't fill it without your help. This Christmas season, the Persecution Project is preparing to airlift emergency relief supplies for 2,000 persecuted Christian families in the war-torn Nuba Mountains of Sudan. "All who desire to live godly in Christ Jesus will be persecuted." -- 2 Timothy 3:12 Friend, the Nuba Mountains are home to Sudan's largest Christian community ... and today, that community is fighting for their survival. Radical Islamists that control the government have kept the Nuba Mountains under a humanitarian blockade since 2011. They've targeted Christians and other political and religious dissidents in Sudan for increased persecution. And in recent weeks, the Islamist government has launched new ground attacks in the Nuba Mountains, displacing at least 7,000 more families from a place called Western Jebel. With the help of generous believers like you, the Persecution Project has worked with the Nuba church to bring tons (literal tons!) of crisis relief supplies to persecuted Christians in the region for more than 10 years. But now, with increasingly dire conditions on the ground, our emergency relief efforts are more urgently needed than ever ... and our Nuba church partners have asked if we can do even more this holiday season. "Suppose a brother or sister is without clothes and daily food. If one of you says to him, "Go, I wish you well; keep warm and well fed,' but does nothing about his physical needs, what good is it? In the same way, faith by itself, if it is not accompanied by action, is dead." -- James 2:15-17 Your gift of $75 will provide supplies for one family, but truly, any amount you can give will help us load the next plane! With your gift today, the Persecution Project can fully supply our Emergency Christmas Airlift so that our local church partners in the Nuba Mountains can deliver urgently-needed supplies -- and a powerful witness of God's love and Christian compassion -- to 2,000 Christian families in need. For every $75 we raise, we can prepare a full emergency relief kit for one family, with items like food, cooking pots, blankets, mosquito netting, and heavy-duty tarps to serve as emergency shelter. A humanitarian relief flight is the only safe way we can deliver supplies to the Nuba Mountains, which are both geographically remote and underdeveloped due to the ongoing blockade by radical Islamist forces. But we need to act fast to serve the thousands of Nuba families recently displaced by new fighting. Persecuted Christian families in the Nuba Mountains need our help now, which is why I'm writing to you today. Thank you for your prayerful consideration. God bless, Brad PhillipsFounder & PresidentPersecution Project Foundation P.O. Box 1327 Culpeper, VA 22701 PO Box 455, Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us to unsubscribe.

body:
Whether you are spending this week celebrating Christmas, Hanukkah, Kwanzaa, or ringing in the new year, I hope you are able to spend time with loved ones and spread joy this season.

| Team –

Happy holidays!

I wanted to take a moment to wish you a Merry Christmas and a happy holiday season!

I am so grateful for all that we’ve accomplished together over the past year – including flipping West Michigan BLUE! – and I cannot wait to see what 2023 has in store.

Whether you are spending this week celebrating Christmas, Hanukkah, Kwanzaa, or ringing in the new year, I hope you are able to spend time with loved ones and spread joy this season.

From our family to yours, happy holidays!
\- Hillary, Jesse, James, & Wesley

name: Andy Biggs
subject: My plan to defeat McCarthy and restore conservative power in Congress >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biggs for Congress
body:
How I'm going to make it happen
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7006d7cde0d04ba7aa8aef0ce2548a29&_e=vmzrC7raEvm_ZVNz6wf6zdo005GqsCVZXExVNFde6c1QBHU5APTQc5nSXhyg0ai35BbYMf8BayH6bkpn_ox6ndIGvU-eUta7YQ9NpAcP9urdiu4RdDQVVXI8ZL8QXLd5Dd1so9jfSLIAZAyKpq3okzhb_2M5BQBANcFc7Bb47GutWl3Q20Pwwgysqnyg7ENI_6gGX-G_ODfVfL4nHp2naxYvd-KVh01meU5xX0rup0yJj9EfJBYmcFFWE1coMfF1GOpKR4g3cOeg3kl6r5oyer6SBNmW3PdtV5b6LS0CuOgMlvybjVRKHM9fEF1sSjwb)
---
| Fellow Patriot,
**I 'm officially challenging Kevin McCarthy as Speaker in the new Republican Congress.**
If you agree a CONSERVATIVE should lead us in Washington... not another RINO Establishment hack like McCarthy...**[I need you to help us mount a pressure campaign over the next 4 weeks.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7006d7cde0d04ba7aa8aef0ce2548a29&_e=vmzrC7raEvm_ZVNz6wf6zdo005GqsCVZXExVNFde6c1QBHU5APTQc5nSXhyg0ai35BbYMf8BayH6bkpn_ox6ndIGvU-eUta7YQ9NpAcP9urdiu4RdDQVVXI8ZL8QXLd5Dd1so9jfSLIAZAyKpq3okzhb_2M5BQBANcFc7Bb47Gvxd3KCJo6Y4Z13kdnfV1iA8YOxt_SYjOuEGLG45r9MsWbxhGsYe4A4vmgpafzUdyJPrrJzg2alrO0qrYEoonYBd-5nPYbyakpPULf_MmJ_W1vaaFitk3svECB2tstaXlOENq3C7RTBdVstBii7swJa)**
My efforts to win over Congress are FAR more powerful if they know that VOTERS want a conservative in charge.
**[Pitch in just $30 to turbocharge our emergency efforts to break the Establishment and elect a CONSERVATIVE Speaker of the House>>](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7006d7cde0d04ba7aa8aef0ce2548a29&_e=vmzrC7raEvm_ZVNz6wf6zdo005GqsCVZXExVNFde6c1QBHU5APTQc5nSXhyg0ai35BbYMf8BayH6bkpn_ox6ndIGvU-eUta7YQ9NpAcP9urdiu4RdDQVVXI8ZL8QXLd5Dd1so9jfSLIAZAyKpq3okzhb_2M5BQBANcFc7Bb47GuWei1n7HQ14tofT-_fCbiBlu6cgtnOAuToCiWh8h5T6HNJr-7vQJAJcu0imRjcTfqfR_m0GBgJS2okdbmfuxluI9gJNbnZMYt04zjmky2UJcirve520Jxngk2IdV2aINwtkNhmUnRthKBovnxc7FQR)** | | | | [FIGHT WITH $30](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7006d7cde0d04ba7aa8aef0ce2548a29&_e=vmzrC7raEvm_ZVNz6wf6zdo005GqsCVZXExVNFde6c1QBHU5APTQc5nSXhyg0ai35BbYMf8BayH6bkpn_ox6ndIGvU-eUta7YQ9NpAcP9urdiu4RdDQVVXI8ZL8QXLd5Dd1so9jfSLIAZAyKpq3okzhb_2M5BQBANcFc7Bb47GvMNllj_ihSxc5U3sfqHgz_E6cZxowE5KWDHuC4d6M43ozKyALUJOZAqtdPuvkihS97K5OnFFBCTGJAwpk4FYDIJjdYPuL497r3kF5NZiuklyXdXkippjNo41XNRD72hGwf1jh7BHQEcOTIvcWHWgcq)
---
**Kevin McCarthy does NOT have the values, the backbone, or the courage** to stand up to Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer.

Like most Establishment Republicans, he sees conservative voters like you and me as the real enemy...and he'll stab us in the back every chance he gets.

For 2 years, I served as Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus... the most powerful and successful congressional bloc of conservatives ever. **I figured out exactly how the Establishment operates and exactly how to defeat them at their own game.**

I'll make you this promise right now: I will NEVER betray conservative voters, surrender my principles, or stop fighting for what matters most.

We won the House in November because the American people voted to STOP Biden's radicalism and BREAK the Establishment's stranglehold on this nation. **McCarthy won 't fight for us...so we've got to do it ourselves.**
