name: Conservatives Give
subject: You may not know the full story
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story

| | | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0219a27630cf42f489e23644e95ec131&_e=cnKNkTa3VNqfaB0cadQ5d7lA8PPITfQy25_FxeFIvOkePUpH_IDs_JoXjfi7LOAgc5OlVYDwYYgXsVJNz3GzNFJeMPLsIu9kOFAaRKPOcHBUsLu6hNazm-VMfgWgCBVCmO1iWRIi5v4mihHLWSzSTwQsqtjyC2jaU8JvOdy16Yxz9bEjXpVY4C_mTeJBWFoHj7HM9lFbBGQcFSKXV9GSlWkRcAF8qEkmyQ-rfmLb09cSLQm7sgIlXJWtv_J9qO3n3BOrJgApYr-oIA1o3t8UHDmBebtoO6ryVGtTMi7F4HV8ZxV5vNzBMlQRNp-rLUz1D2W-pHW4wu8ArBnt1L0rJAtpaIX5yghLLBgvppfLNs7aEWcYJR53P48p33-X2mCu)
---
| | Dear Friend,
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0219a27630cf42f489e23644e95ec131&_e=cnKNkTa3VNqfaB0cadQ5d7lA8PPITfQy25_FxeFIvOkePUpH_IDs_JoXjfi7LOAgc5OlVYDwYYgXsVJNz3GzNFJeMPLsIu9kOFAaRKPOcHBUsLu6hNazm-VMfgWgCBVCmO1iWRIi5v4mihHLWSzSTwQsqtjyC2jaU8JvOdy16Yxz9bEjXpVY4C_mTeJBWFoHj7HM9lFbBGQcFSKXV9GSlWkRcAF8qEkmyQ-rfmLb09eggagIIjTCxagoqp2jlrG0R8RE_rAy4HiHx8RqgiDGKe-3luckJNjZN44qh2XRdxEuSTdn7Cb2RuvNTF1ONmjYhBQwQWh21wg4foXsU0hFi9M_XsHkE7j7BgTP-8fLIPpRyFpxou8BBgfy9TZTta_f)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0219a27630cf42f489e23644e95ec131&_e=cnKNkTa3VNqfaB0cadQ5d7lA8PPITfQy25_FxeFIvOkePUpH_IDs_JoXjfi7LOAgc5OlVYDwYYgXsVJNz3GzNFJeMPLsIu9kOFAaRKPOcHBUsLu6hNazm-VMfgWgCBVCmO1iWRIi5v4mihHLWSzSTwQsqtjyC2jaU8JvOdy16Yxz9bEjXpVY4C_mTeJBWFoHj7HM9lFbBGQcFSKXV9GSlWkRcAF8qEkmyQ-rfmLb09eSOubCbQDeAkY3jS8aFNo-R16r6M_p6xb0EPOidoSyDFRceht7puhma7-mJbHtIajAX3CTYfpiF8HIqxsAG8XOucOAiIFfPrGCJPE4FcoPytxor50jEJbE4hlPQZijQZ52MB0fIi5MAlJWKoDtMDvn)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of **“The David Story”** while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0219a27630cf42f489e23644e95ec131&_e=cnKNkTa3VNqfaB0cadQ5d7lA8PPITfQy25_FxeFIvOkePUpH_IDs_JoXjfi7LOAgc5OlVYDwYYgXsVJNz3GzNFJeMPLsIu9kOFAaRKPOcHBUsLu6hNazm-VMfgWgCBVCmO1iWRIi5v4mihHLWSzSTwQsqtjyC2jaU8JvOdy16Yxz9bEjXpVY4C_mTeJBWFoHj7HM9lFbBGQcFSKXV9GSlWkRcAF8qEkmyQ-rfmLb09d14Ndy93JTtMSmezz_jWf86NENKH0rqh8-KglUBB257ejqPFnKsGQkCTN1gou4nb8qGmwvjwAvbrsjC1cTWIe3XKWKPwxk2BxZq6TyXXSP6JC4PgPHDoVGrclvKHh3vDKgKB90ZjivESW0m08X8dS0)**

name: Liz Walters, Team ODP
subject: Wishing you a very happy holiday season, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
No matter how you celebrate, we hope you are surrounded by friends, family, community, and hope for the year ahead.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56327015/384655345/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTExMjZhMi1lYjgyLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PyrSTAbnt88ZM67VobGWWyFRlNfEE7_yb6Ernuubldw=) | The New Year is just around the corner – and on behalf of myself and all of Team ODP, we wanted to take a moment to wish you a very happy holiday season, team.

No matter how you celebrate, we hope you are surrounded by friends, family, community, and hope for the year ahead.

Ohio Democrats are so grateful for the support you have shown us. We thank you and the thousands of Ohioans who stepped up in 2022 and volunteered, donated, and voted. We are immensely grateful and proud of our candidates who fought tirelessly to deliver for working families across our state.

From our family here at Team ODP to yours, we wish you a warm and relaxing holiday season with your family and loved ones.

We look forward to seeing you in the new year!

Liz Walters
Chair
The Ohio Democratic Party

Suite 101
Columbus, Ohio 43215

The Maricopa County Recorder in charge of the county's elections was caught red-handed...

He was running a PAC to stop me & our movement—all while overseeing an election with my name on the ballot.

His goal: Stop Kari Lake by any means necessary.

He spent months smearing the audit

He lobbied against election integrity bills

He created an anti-Kari Super PAC

He worked with the Government to censor information

And his machines didn't work on election day.

Help us fight back and Save Arizona!

name: Majority Leader-elect Steve Scalise
subject: I can’t close the survey without your response!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Friend,
My team combed through the early responses to my Majority Leader Survey and informed me your response is still missing.
We only asked a handful of our top Patriots to reply and need **100% participation** in order to fully represent our movement.
I'd hate to close the survey without hearing from you, so I'm giving you one final chance to submit your honest feedback. [**Can you submit your response to my Majority Leader Survey before 11:59 PM?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=87c29d9c721c4ce5b8dbab58bfeab855&_e=HsfU3FXixlUUySI30yX9puB9ibu3xldBAgzk7avnxMEY-e_vX5_5pyJyPVyb4T9X5YJLivGmhzA-jxMWP7VA_Vkz7TbLKTgMMtGNwIIuPliMrtiN4hFe2EewYElwY_hwph77QtzlgTRCKme18-gT4M52edPC-ygE9QPMvpN2prbf-dmVQn-Ga_ahW3Tl4O-FvF2NMDyYqaEx6UCHfjMMU7O1xLqiUxmiMLeaiiDEpR8RE6hOVxfp0GmYsnGGvL3rRH4A5OngtONXmWb4z8nR2LKE8nRonwKgAe_8cEBF5G7zc0b5-wQ_cUA76EL7uuAA_I5PMHgXysvrTWjiY97hX7YIvLiWVzqoPcZhLbksoc4RiRudtG74DNShKnbUxMRoq1_HcDyfYXpgOKqh6bcHtsJHlRRDqo-4eGBjcYT0IY4u9h3H0HqNPkKuj2F_8mGp2KAhcCRU0hI-0OS-ZzLdCFBLAbKk0pI2QKOLmP0NeX8%3D)
I look forward to hearing from you, Friend.
Thank you,
Steve Scalise
_Forwarded Message Below:_
**OFFICIAL MESSAGE FROM MAJORITY LEADER-ELECT STEVE SCALISE**
---
Hey Friend,
I just released my FIRST-EVER [**Majority Leader Survey**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=87c29d9c721c4ce5b8dbab58bfeab855&_e=TSZDGoNtIv44qojHGZki9pFWMENsXKiwyrTI_15I5ZBq2JX9aJIyhxKTPP3FguwYzb2U07di4VT_bIUxJQkwarX52c-CWqi2t0D67qi_N8UwOj08lpGV0g9doIrmifNr8sV0hjpL3X4N4WYTdmHxbb812dm91C7aoCYRSQIi4pRgUW4DCuVwhtF0pjSvdlIj3-Tfzlz1OhEZJOe80ww8ActoyUh7DLCr-VDnyidT0jUQnc4YUi6wCvVX9y9PQGSMHnBwg1F_CzR-E-weUczg9lAB7fDLVbDxcOQfXfKJ9TUjiMLAt41Ce8JYn5lVXcq776xJW19Q4hNx_LHFwr93ihcyctW1o03IpQUAsaavg5F3PAUYGpMU4eHRDqBywrVRix3xTTJBwg7zZZMweer30HrtBxTY0SGNpnNXmq83elWCIOaqnwO0Mzb-zBuj5vUKISGLke4DlnTZltbSxGypJCPSok5nqruJbzYfdy5CFdw%3D) and I want YOU to be in the first round of Patriots to submit their response.
[**My survey only takes a few minutes to complete, but I need your response by 11:59 PM tonight!**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=87c29d9c721c4ce5b8dbab58bfeab855&_e=TSZDGoNtIv44qojHGZki9pFWMENsXKiwyrTI_15I5ZBq2JX9aJIyhxKTPP3FguwYzb2U07di4VT_bIUxJQkwarX52c-CWqi2t0D67qi_N8UwOj08lpGV0g9doIrmifNr8sV0hjpL3X4N4WYTdmHxbb812dm91C7aoCYRSQIi4pRgUW4DCuVwhtF0pjSvdlIj3-Tfzlz1OhEZJOe80ww8ActoyUh7DLCr-VDnyidT0jUQnc4YUi6wCvVX9y9PQGSMHnBwg1F_CzR-E-weUczg9lAB7fDLVbDxcOQfXfKJ9TUjiMLAt41Ce8JYn5lVXcq7QK0qX49l5y8LMe72WzPMAU-RI6KUwpeNHBeWXHjhNPpIXvtNS1ksEER0z6aFu-DvYyQpFgNmi-KtxgzH7aWP4KsSWhlMOBoCTQlCZsoXKsGg5DyqRt-oGx_bThEm2sEHnPkUY0IXmJtQLW4Dy4Jl32hZcI3NTJdVYC3q5aBEb_s%3D) Consider this your opportunity to be open and honest with Congressional leaders.
******[SUBMIT YOUR RESPONSE >>](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=87c29d9c721c4ce5b8dbab58bfeab855&_e=TSZDGoNtIv44qojHGZki9pFWMENsXKiwyrTI_15I5ZBq2JX9aJIyhxKTPP3FguwYzb2U07di4VT_bIUxJQkwarX52c-CWqi2t0D67qi_N8UwOj08lpGV0g9doIrmifNr8sV0hjpL3X4N4WYTdmHxbb812dm91C7aoCYRSQIi4pRgUW4DCuVwhtF0pjSvdlIj3-Tfzlz1OhEZJOe80ww8ActoyUh7DLCr-VDnyidT0jUQnc4YUi6wCvVX9y9PQGSMHnBwg1F_CzR-E-weUczg9lAB7fDLVbDxcOQfXfKJ9TUjiMLAt41Ce8JYn5lVXcq7pRs3qrzLGd7IMSneK581vq3w5q2VZIrzFAvrSQG2xPyEuxWtrCVQR5rAas3p0BGYyUbXk_9KMHrZSSsYvaArql-2rJFQMhi31G2T8b3nMIEjvAiWbrKuaqH9fX2Rbtu1TXxUO2MenC7A8yIYN3wpDy2ot4fNWExEexg6HdjwJWc%3D)**
It's critical I get your response before then because I'm meeting with top Republican leaders before our legislative deadline. Without your feedback, I'll be powerless to change our agenda in Washington.
I look forward to reading your response.
Thank you,
Steve Scalise

| | Dear Fellow American,
Does America need a "Great Reset?"
In 2020, members of the world's elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy.
As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "we need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life.
A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives.
**This seminar --titled ["The Great Reset?](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e9f8d374dd8740d29ad8cc5203cd9410&_e=qCTejTnvtkFeO_VOxqeF0BmPePN614ddXUEid68gMlhx0E5FfFcv9_Z_4uKR8gDhv7eZywigRBjQ9S40vk2dlMp63OQbc_CBWNL1kXdc2WJE76sycbODEBt6b1F3RA77ebYynxiCKA5PXtk8-137tkLQ-_WQ_747yMBeQCxBd9__dfUZ4NJwOML5RmnqsOWnCunLbNEIbnaVgaMIv9xpOaQIgiRBBmg3mgTGc6SVUQ7SaP-s07WCkZrlu8bmW0G_chNPfLcb7NqZU0YnithVwRG72j1G99M1nJD_KGQAYRcrXprpsbpTEvpFV0Suw-CxEP_7E_BYZ5I3E8OfcFxxIHkgft37CT8C5IBCsf6yXksBxX0S2YGxS0MAGwhVN8Ws)****["](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e9f8d374dd8740d29ad8cc5203cd9410&_e=qCTejTnvtkFeO_VOxqeF0BmPePN614ddXUEid68gMlhx0E5FfFcv9_Z_4uKR8gDhv7eZywigRBjQ9S40vk2dlMp63OQbc_CBWNL1kXdc2WJE76sycbODEBt6b1F3RA77ebYynxiCKA5PXtk8-137tkLQ-_WQ_747yMBeQCxBd9__dfUZ4NJwOML5RmnqsOWnCunLbNEIbnaVgaMIv9xpOaQIgiRBBmg3mgTGc6SVUQ6Ip6yMYeTxa-V_xGh_9mxZF3TqkMPjmd6kPl7gq1JQnPoi1i3jp4-WbpX3NQ8r7NM2qzDTDitv6I_k5RTzN3aMymjvJ4KHuQoI6xlLZiEQQzhtCRUn6k0KO0BPGxBbIirQGwQOUSBM0Cg4aUwTyddx) --is now available as a free online video series.**

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Happy Holidays
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
We’re ending this year in a brighter place than where we began. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - | Hi there, Despite some cold weather this week, I'm starting this holiday break confident that sunnier days are ahead for Colorado. _(And it was extra sunny the day we took our last family photo!)_ This has been an important year for Colorado and our country, and as it comes to an end, I want you to know how much I’ve appreciated your partnership and support. We worked hard in 2022, and as a result, we’re ending this year in a brighter place than we began. Colorado is blue – and our democracy is stronger — because of all that we’ve done together. Thank you, and I wish you a wonderful season filled with health, hope, and joy! Happy Holidays, Michael |

name: Charles Booker
subject: We made historic progress together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

It has been just over a month since our historic campaign came to an end.
We might not have received the results we needed to win, but we broke some
real barriers and made historic progress that is critical for our future.

We brought together over half a million regular Kentuckians – from the
Hood to the Holler – to stand up and say that we have had enough. In half
of Kentucky counties, our campaign out-performed the democratic ticket
from 2020. And we did it with a small fraction of the financial support or
media attention.

We never received the big checks my opponent did. We didn’t have the
national support that other Senate candidates enjoyed. And we didn’t have
super PACs and dark money coalescing around our race. But despite all of
that, we had the support of hundreds of thousands of people like you who
decided to stand up and join our movement. For that, I am so grateful and
inspired.

But I’ll be straight with you, Peter. Because we left it all on
the field in the final days of the election, our campaign has some debt to
pay. A combination of unavoidable expenses and missed fundraising goals
have left us with a gap that we need to close in order to close out our
campaign and focus on building the next chapter.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18856?t=1001&akid=2843%2E346206%2E3JMOwF ]I need your help. If you are able, please consider making a
contribution today.

CHIP IN →

Thank you again for everything you did and continue to do. As we approach
the holiday season, I hope you are enjoying a period of reflection and
relaxation with your loved ones.

I’ll be in touch soon.

Charles

clean_body: [1]Charles Booker Peter, It has been just over a month since our historic campaign came to an end. We might not have received the results we needed to win, but we broke some real barriers and made historic progress that is critical for our future. We brought together over half a million regular Kentuckians – from the Hood to the Holler – to stand up and say that we have had enough. In half of Kentucky counties, our campaign out-performed the democratic ticket from 2020. And we did it with a small fraction of the financial support or media attention. We never received the big checks my opponent did. We didn’t have the national support that other Senate candidates enjoyed. And we didn’t have super PACs and dark money coalescing around our race. But despite all of that, we had the support of hundreds of thousands of people like you who decided to stand up and join our movement. For that, I am so grateful and inspired. But I’ll be straight with you, Peter. Because we left it all on the field in the final days of the election, our campaign has some debt to pay. A combination of unavoidable expenses and missed fundraising goals have left us with a gap that we need to close in order to close out our campaign and focus on building the next chapter. [ ]I need your help. If you are able, please consider making a contribution today. CHIP IN → Thank you again for everything you did and continue to do. As we approach the holiday season, I hope you are enjoying a period of reflection and relaxation with your loved ones. I’ll be in touch soon. Charles Contribute to Charles Booker:

body:

We only asked a handful of our top Patriots to reply and need **100% participation** in order to fully represent our movement.
I’d hate to close the survey without hearing from you, so I’m giving you one final chance to submit your honest feedback. body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56317587/384618770/-1148906397?refcode=fl_email_na_20221223happyholidays_wm_od90ds_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWQ1ZjQ3Yy1kMjgyLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wsMe2Vfa2URJvuGTYa_clQn2wfGiw0WdRNXMlMjGcVQ=)

Hi friends, We’re really in the thick of the holiday season, so before you log off to spend time with friends and family, I wanted to reach out one last time and thank you. **Thank you for believing in me and Aruna and our shared vision for a Maryland that leaves no one behind. In 2022, we successfully built a diverse, powerful grassroots movement from the ground-up across every part of the state, fueled by love and hope for a brighter future for all.** Together, we made history and won this critical election for Governor and Lieutenant Governor of Maryland — and that was just the beginning. I cannot wait to see what we accomplish together in 2023 and beyond! Whether you’re celebrating the sixth night of Hanukkah, getting ready for Christmas or Kwanzaa, or just enjoying this cozy winter season, I hope you have a very peaceful and joyful end of 2022 surrounded by loved ones. _**From my family to yours, happy holidays, and thanks for being in this movement with us.**_ | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56317590/384618772/-1148906397?refcode=fl_email_na_20221223happyholidays_wm_od90ds_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWQ1ZjQ3Yy1kMjgyLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wsMe2Vfa2URJvuGTYa_clQn2wfGiw0WdRNXMlMjGcVQ=)
---
Elevate,
Wes

Support Wes as he works to move our state forward and leave no one behind.

name: VoteVets.org
subject: We spent down our resources to win in 2022, so we’re asking for your help to make sure we’re ready for the fights ahead.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Not a day goes by that VoteVets isn’t thankful for everything you’ve done to support our work.
#
Derek -
First and foremost, we want to wish you and those you care about a safe and happy holiday season.
Not a day goes by that VoteVets isn’t thankful for everything you’ve done to support our work.
In 2022, we raised hundreds of thousands of dollars to aid suffering Ukrainians, we were one of the top spending organizations and helped hold the Senate, and legislatively we fought for and helped pass the PACT Act through Congress.
Thank you.
But now we’re preparing for the year ahead: a divided Congress, another presidential election, and more.
We’ve spent down our resources in the last election, so we’re holding a year-end fundraising drive to ensure we’re to engage in the struggles ahead.
Our voices matter, but they are silent without your help. So please:
[**Can you contribute $3 to VoteVets before our year-end fundraising drive comes to a close? We would not ask were it not so important to our work.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec22.pX32s6&refcode=em221223-1-15&t=1&akid=7243%2E3013755%2E5sBCOe)

name: Mayor Lee Harris
subject: Here's Why I'm Optimistic About 2023.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lee Harris for Mayor, Rajiv Singh, Esq
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/leeharris2022?refcode=email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/leeharris2022?refcode=email]
December 23, 2022
Dear friend,
As we wind down 2022, I couldn’t be more encouraged by all the good happening in our community.
Consider all that has happened in just this month. I met with dozens of community leaders who were part of our second-term transition team. They put together an incredible road map of ideas and opportunities for the next four years [https://ournextera.com/report/] . I can’t wait to get started working on their suggestions.
In addition, I joined the County Commission Chairman to host the portrait unveiling for former Commissioner Walter Baile [https://tri-statedefender.com/walter-l-bailey-jr-portrait-for-201-poplar-unveiled-at-national-civil-rights-museum/12/15/?amp] y, one of Memphis and Shelby County’s most enduring and important leaders. The event was appropriately held at the National Civil Rights Museum. It gave us a chance to honor Commissioner Bailey and his family, but also a chance to recognize one of America’s top portraitists.
Finally, this month, I worked with leaders from around our county and suburbs to come together with a plan to invest $100 million in a new high school [https://www.shelbycountytn.gov/DocumentCenter/View/40517/SHELBY-COUNTY-BOARD-OF-COMMISSIONERS-GIVES-NOTICE-OF-SPECIAL-SESSION-FOR-WEDNESDAY-DECEMBER-14-TO-APPROVE-3G-SCHOOLS-CONSENSUS-AGREEMENT-] in one of our community’s growing areas. We all worked so hard on the new plan, because we all agreed that our kids deserve first-class learning environments.
There’s plenty of reason to be encouraged about where we are right now as a community. There’s also good reason to be optimistic about next year.
Rest assured, my team and I still have plenty of gas left in the tank. We plan to work on a variety of initiatives, including the launch of our initiative to rid Shelby County Government of cars that rely on fossil fuels [https://www.shelbycountytn.gov/DocumentCenter/View/40131/SHELBY-COUNTY-MAYOR-LEE-HARRIS-TO-SIGN-GREEN-FLEET-EXECUTIVE-ORDER-TO-COMBAT-CLIMATE-CHANGE-AND-REPLACE-GAS-VEHICLES] .
All the best and happy holidays,
Lee Harris
Shelby County Mayor

name: =?utf-8?q?Ra=C3=BAl_Grijalva?=
subject: More progressives in Congress…
body:
#
Hi Peter, it’s Raúl Grijalva. Congressman for Arizona’s 7th district.
As a progressive leader in Congress, I'm proud to work with **Justice Democrats** to advance environmental justice, Medicare for All, a $15/hour living wage, free college, and to make sure Wall Street and the billionaire class pay their fair share.
But in order to make progress on these and so many important issues, we need more progressives in Congress and that's why I'm reaching out to you today.
**Justice Democrats is the only organization in the progressive arena that actually recruits candidates to run for office** and helps their campaigns every single step of the way.
There is just over a week until the end-of-the year and Justice Democrats is working to raise $75,000 before midnight on the 31st to fully fund their 2024 Candidate Recruitment plans.
[**Will you rush a $3 contribution to Justice Democrats to help them reach their $75,000 end-of-year fundraising goal?**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123866?refcode=em20221223-26702&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=26702%2E1203867%2E3utwmK)
**[Contribute $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123866?refcode=em20221223-26702&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=26702%2E1203867%2E3utwmK)**
I ran for Congress because I believe in the power of bringing people together to improve our communities and make our country a more just place.
I know that Justice Democrats will recruit other progressive leaders who believe in these same principles. But it takes a lot of resources to build a campaign from scratch, especially when you reject corporate PAC contributions.
[**Please make a contribution to Justice Democrats. They need your support before the end of the year.**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123866?refcode=em20221223-26702&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=26702%2E1203867%2E3utwmK)
Thank you for standing with us today.
Peace,
Raúl Grijalva

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=22&akid=26702%2E1203867%2E3utwmK) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=23&akid=26702%2E1203867%2E3utwmK) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221223-26702-footer&t=24&refcode2=26702_1203867_3utwmK&akid=26702%2E1203867%2E3utwmK)**

name: Dan Goldman
subject: Happy Holidays
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Hi Peter, I wanted to take a moment to extend my warmest wishes to you and your loved ones this holiday season, and to thank you from the bottom of my heart for all of your support this year. As I reflect on this past year and prepare to get sworn in on January 3, I am overwhelmed with appreciation and humility to represent New York’s 10th District in the 118th Congress. As we see in the report of the January 6 Select Committee that was released last night, we have a lot of work to do to preserve and protect our democracy. But that work is essential so that we can make sure everyone in our community has equal access to the opportunity to pursue the American Dream upon which this nation was founded. In that vein, I want to share a family tradition that we will be observing in my home tonight. On one night of Chanukah each year, my children designate a charitable cause of their choice to support. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56337344/384673893/-685658972?2621.donation=form1&df_id=2621&mfc_pref=T&refcode=AU_DSG_CL_GEN_CHA_AC_20221223_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTdiNjJjNS0wNDgzLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f9NgKuVm2ZIPN4lV0xUcZaEtZKikncG2sbUhbafZD34=&emci=27453bba-fa82-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=817b62c5-0483-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=13556823) In year’s past, the causes have ranged from helping puppies find a home, to providing clean water to those who don’t have it, to helping other children suffering from devastating illness. Several years ago, one of my daughters wanted to help those suffering from food insecurity. After some research, she found City Harvest, New York’s largest food rescue organization. City Harvest now distributes _80 million_ pounds of food per year to those in our community struggling with food insecurity. As part of our ongoing support, we recently went to City Harvest’s fabulous new warehouse in Sunset Park and helped repack nearly 10,000 pounds of fruit for families around the city. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56337345/384673895/-685658972?2621.donation=form1&df_id=2621&mfc_pref=T&refcode=AU_DSG_CL_GEN_CHA_AC_20221223_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTdiNjJjNS0wNDgzLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f9NgKuVm2ZIPN4lV0xUcZaEtZKikncG2sbUhbafZD34=&emci=27453bba-fa82-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=817b62c5-0483-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=13556823)****Between now and December 31st, generous supporters of City Harvest are matching all gifts, dollar-for-dollar, up to $110,000. If you’re financially able, will you join my daughter in supporting City Harvest by making a contribution of any amount to ensure every New Yorker has nourishing food this holiday season?** | [MAKE A CONTRIBUTION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56337346/384673896/-685658972?2621.donation=form1&df_id=2621&mfc_pref=T&refcode=AU_DSG_CL_GEN_CHA_AC_20221223_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTdiNjJjNS0wNDgzLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f9NgKuVm2ZIPN4lV0xUcZaEtZKikncG2sbUhbafZD34=&emci=27453bba-fa82-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=817b62c5-0483-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=13556823)
---
Thank you for joining me in giving back and making our community a little stronger this holiday season.
Happy Holidays to you and yours,

clean_body: | Hi Peter, I wanted to take a moment to extend my warmest wishes to you and your loved ones this holiday season, and to thank you from the bottom of my heart for all of your support this year. As I reflect on this past year and prepare to get sworn in on January 3, I am overwhelmed with appreciation and humility to represent New York’s 10th District in the 118th Congress. As we see in the report of the January 6 Select Committee that was released last night, we have a lot of work to do to preserve and protect our democracy. But that work is essential so that we can make sure everyone in our community has equal access to the opportunity to pursue the American Dream upon which this nation was founded. In that vein, I want to share a family tradition that we will be observing in my home tonight. On one night of Chanukah each year, my children designate a charitable cause of their choice to support. In year’s past, the causes have ranged from helping puppies find a home, to providing clean water to those who don’t have it, to helping other children suffering from devastating illness. Several years ago, one of my daughters wanted to help those suffering from food insecurity. After some research, she found City Harvest, New York’s largest food rescue organization. City Harvest now distributes 80 million pounds of food per year to those in our community struggling with food insecurity. As part of our ongoing support, we recently went to City Harvest’s fabulous new warehouse in Sunset Park and helped repack nearly 10,000 pounds of fruit for families around the city. now and December 31st, generous supporters of City Harvest are matching all gifts, dollar-for-dollar, up to $110,000. If you’re financially able, will you join my daughter in supporting City Harvest by making a contribution of any amount to ensure every New Yorker has nourishing food this holiday season? | Thank you for joining me in giving back and making our community a little stronger this holiday season. Happy Holidays to you and yours, Dan Dan Goldman for New York PO BOX 3306 New York, NY 10008 United States | mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com | Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York

name: Richard Walker
subject: Shocking quote from medical student about current med schools
body:
New requirement for medical students: social “justice”
[](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdkMlugzAQhp_G3EDY7AcObaP00E1VTzkhY0-CUy_EmETk6WsIqapK1kjz_-NZPqhxXuAS45RkAa9pTvfAA1GTmBBMSILzGMdplJRlWtKsytoiA0wLlMagqJARxRdqrTEqYkYFXV2kcYlbzLMS9pxVrIUiS2nOqgwDBZYHsu6c6weUPCCy9W8ANlqIqAZu3NzEay3oI1VC23HofGrkpHrBULIdnWoUcDEqlGyWBRDJZ3Ewo2XgRc1kQ1UvxX5aLeZTKg7am7eTwr_thR6ccKODhhtNnTC6Mb0TSlyhWS9bJjIqBzdy0G5oWmu-wdIDNHdK91FGO19xWyOczmf7WXVfrfN2o6Xg3vgndoJ7FJujujr4SF8DW_P-IqQUQz4zPiyMZ7LrTTUqHhEhyzdCFojktLsoOx7Vy3P4tpvCU_6ustkkTz66qYffyrVJtJIjqNj8AA3AqUE)

Friend,

A Benjamin Rush Institute (BRI) medical student sat with Heartland Daily News to discuss the push for radical wokeness in medical schools.

**This BRI member had to stay anonymous to avoid repercussions for speaking out about what 's really happening in medical schools. Here's what the student had to say:**

_" Higher profile residency programs have paid staff whose job it is to scrub social media platforms and [perform] Google searches to learn about what applicants have posted. **They say it is to address "professional" concerns, but it is likely to **__**identify the social justice warriors and to make sure they pick someone who won 't rock the boat.**__**"**_

Medical schools are replacing the doctor/patient relationship with radical wokeness and social justice.

That's why BRI is establishing chapters on college campuses to teach students about free market healthcare and the importance of the doctor/patient relationship.

I've set a goal to raise $10,000 in the next 48 hours to help fund our campus chapters.

[_**Friend, can you support medical students who are fighting back against radical wokeness in medicine? Click here to send $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdkMtOwzAQRb_G2TWKHTsJiyyACpCAwraryLGnrYsfwXZUtV-Pk6YIIVkjzb3jeRxocVXjBmNKWCZbXvEdyEy1pCAEE1LiqsAFzcumoQ1nd6yvGWBeI1qA4UrnHJ-4986ZXDiTHVome9rIfseA4bJvmpJSKgrAgtLkAM10e4hxCKi8R-QpvQBi9JBzC9LFqUnSerBHbpT1Yzik1OmzGZRA5dMYTWdAqtGgcj0vgEg1icGNXkASrdAdN4NWu_NiiZRytbfJvJ60-tte2RBVHCN00lkelbOdG6Iy6gLdctk8UXAd4ijBxtD13n2B53vobpRuo5yNqeK6xmoT2PDCPsFuk91ZrWQy_okHJROK9dFcInzQt8y3cjgprVWoJsb7mfFEdrmpRfUDImT-RsgMkXxvT8aPR_P6vHrfnlff1cawySSPKcbzAL-VS5N8IUdQvf4Btw-nrw)

Instead of learning how to treat and heal patients, this anonymous student and others are now:
* Spending an entire semester in clinical medicine on gender
* Learning all the "genders" and "sexual orientations"
* Simulating conversations with patients about their pronouns
* Learn to use _** "assigned at birth"**_ when describing biological sex and _**" chestfeeding"**_ to describe breastfeeding
* Learn that puberty blockers and cross-sex hormone treatments are _harmless_ and _reversible_

**" They talk to us about "big medicine" and how under corporate medicine, or socialized medicine, we will likely have 15 minutes with a patient, but I must spend five of those minutes playing alphabet soup trying to learn about gender preferences."
-- Anonymous Student**

**How are doctors ever supposed to get to know their patients in under 15 minutes? **

[](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdkMlOwzAQhp_GuTWKnf2QA7Qqh7Kc4RK59qRx8RK8qApPjxMCQkjWSPP_41k-6HBV4wbjgpQJ72hFB-CJ6EhGCCYkx1WGsyLNm6ZoaNmW57oETGtUZKCokCnFN2qtMSplRiVj15YDZm0DpGA1awvOhoJmNWvKus3pkA-J7EbvJ4fyO0SO8TlgwUJKNXDjlyZRO4O-UiW0DW6MqZGzmgRD-TF41SvgIiiUH9YFEKkW0ZlgGURRM9lTNUkxzJvFYkrFRUfz-6Td3_ZCOy988NBzo6kXRvdm8kKJT-i3y9aJjErnAwftXX-25h0svUD_Q-lnlNE-VnyvsdufXDnzkb-FaPdaCh6Nf-IoeERxuKpPDy_FY2I7Pt2ElMJVC-PLynghu93UofoeEbJ-I2SFSD5eb8qGqzo97J5e591H9azKxST7GP08wW_l1iTdyBFUH74APB6oaQ)

BRI believes everyone suffers when bad healthcare regulations undermine the patient-doctor relationship.

Can you help us educate and inform medical students about positive, proven healthcare policies that preserve and protect the fundamental doctor/patient relationship?

Benjamin Rush Institute sets up chapters in medical schools across America. We provide resources to chapters to host pro-free market and pro-liberty speakers on campus. These chapters also network with other likeminded organizations to protect the doctor-patient relationship.

Our chapters have been blocked on some medical school campuses by radical left-wing administrators, even though BRI's nonpartisan, free-market approach focuses on improving healthcare -- not politics.

But we're fighting back and your immediate help is needed to get resources into the hands of students to stop the indoctrination.

[_**Can I count on you to join BRI in connecting with and educating medical students? Click below to help us meet our goal of $10,000 in the next 24 hours.**_](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdkMtu2zAQRb-G2lkwR6KoLLRo6zyAtOk6K2FEjm06fCgUBcP5-lKKUhQFiAHm3uE8DnW8kbzlvAZR6A4bPJIuTAd7AA5Q8WbP93VZtW3dorgTgxTEUbJ6Tw6NLZFfMcYQXKmCK86daFoJAx9arNtBDW19N0Alj0JxgVxJXtjunNI4seobg4f8JlJzpBI96ZCWJlkbyF_QGR_n6ZzTYG9uNIpVD3NyvSNtZseqw7oAg2YRpzBHRVn0yvboRmuOt81SOUVz8tn8PGn3b3vjp2TSnKjXwWMywfdhTMaZD-q3y9aJCu2UZk0-Tf0QwxtFPFH_RelrVPApV3yusZP3T0_PQr7hS7Z7b43Oxn_i2eiM4nBxH4l-1z-L2Onxaqw1U7MwPq2MF7LbTR2T3xnA-g1ghQjvr1cX54t7ftz9er3t3psXJxYTfuSYbiP9rdyalBs5YPLwB4Mhpk4)

name: Del. Jazz Lewis
subject: From our family to yours
body:
Friend, for our family, the holidays are a time to celebrate, reflect, and build. Celebrate our accomplishments, reflect on those who helped us succeed, and build for the challenges we’ll face in the upcoming year.

I am optimistic about what we can accomplish in 2023 and am so thankful for your support for making all of this possible.

Wishing you safe and happy holidays!

- Jazz

By Authority Friends of Jazz Lewis, Treasurer Chris Taitt
Friends of Jazz Lewis - State Account
P.O. Box 341854
Bethesda, MD 20827
United States

name: Patty Murray
subject: What we accomplished together
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Thank you.
#
Peter,
What we accomplished together in 2022 is nothing short of incredible. With the unwavering support of this team, we defended this Senate seat in Washington state, helped flip a red seat blue in Pennsylvania, and helped Senator Raphael Warnock prevail in the Georgia runoffs.
Thanks to the hours volunteered, the dollars donated, and the votes cast by folks just like you, we beat the odds and are sending an even stronger Democratic majority to the Senate in 2023.
I am excited about the opportunities we’ll have to make progress next year in the Senate — and am proud that the Senate closed out this year with a year-end spending bill that delivered for the people of Washington state.
Just this week, I helped pass a bill that will help make child care more affordable, protect workers' rights, and get more families the resources they need to keep a roof over their heads and to heat their homes. It will also bolster mental health and substance use disorder programs, support pregnant workers, includes my PREVENT Pandemics Act to make sure we learn from the lessons of this pandemic and are better prepared for the next one, and so much more.
And in January when the new Senate is sworn in, I’ll continue fighting for the progress you all sent me here to make. That means finally fixing our broken childcare system, fighting for paid leave, and restoring _Roe v. Wade_ — to name a few.
I am proud to be your voice in the other Washington. Thank you for having my back in 2022 and for staying with me in the fight.
Patty Murray

****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56337799/384675602/237856845?refcode=pm_em_221223_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWFjMzIxMC0wNjgzLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RAIXkKA--1MKK3o57kOJzZIchCb_JDSpU_1KpXp-kDg=)****

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**
* * *
PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let us know if you would like to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/q9iNeaDCVUi-n6xIKf7j9g2?unsubscribedata=1xzYE1svOvNqWltN%2F6N%2By%2B5wGvHdI6VsGR3tk3eLWWex0HWfOkaCNsmR02m5r8KtrxopG0k5u341jbqcwyJI2kLbJAV3PbDbr89GomYiwkhAnl%2B%2Bcz48GAelvmCml%2Fi03SRBU5ZG1th0PBEg5ip0O%2FMIAzanPRAfnzYqyc2c127GLWZDSgDpyUmV4sVD6voey9gBwNVY%2Fw17ICCOKTY89qSNb%2FeU9FhDy5o%2BAIShx%2BR%2BBsaEMAhkX9i3P2m3YEy761BKA2o7x2WV54d%2BXARAx1SLpF%2Fc0%2BI9phiCRhcBc7aoxyEsTgSo4hv8meD4bkvyUY6VXAvl4KJe%2FmS7neNH4LrSXPW92G2luUg34wWKwLOCdNlqDdtO%2FLsI7cYOIiINa1CVrxmHbMrbOr2CYixC%2Bln0TV50E%2BoDZ50gaIu%2BDGfWWmnXtHr%2BMeXgR1ecLpuD). Join us today in fighting for progressive values: [donate now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56337800/384675603/-1835341818?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWFjMzIxMC0wNjgzLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RAIXkKA--1MKK3o57kOJzZIchCb_JDSpU_1KpXp-kDg=).

name: John + Gisele Fetterman
subject: HoHoHo.png
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
[fetterman fam pic enclosed]
#
Derek, its John, Gisele + the whole crew here:
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-holiday-card-email?source=em20221223-8181&t=1&akid=8181%2E434096%2E8JKLyl)
We just wanted to take a moment to say...
**Thank you, thank you, THANK YOU for everything you did this year**. We could *not* have done it without you. 🥰
As we celebrate the holidays + a New Year, we want *you* to join in with us. And since we know how many folks are on this incredible Team, we thought maybe we’d make the BIGGEST Holiday Card ever 🤣
**[So, can you celebrate with us and add your name to our Holiday Card?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-holiday-card-email?source=em20221223-8181&t=2&akid=8181%2E434096%2E8JKLyl)**
**[Sign Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-holiday-card-email?source=em20221223-8181&t=3&akid=8181%2E434096%2E8JKLyl)**
HAPPY HOLIDAYS!! 🎄
—John, Gisele, and the whole Crew

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20221223-8181-footer&t=4&refcode2=8181_434096_8JKLyl&akid=8181%2E434096%2E8JKLyl)**

---
[](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=827d632b7f3f4c5c865c9daaf5f95aee&_e=p6WxYp9hbJc_H7RDjsX29PRq4EhNQbFM1RTfVqEXfl5dVzxgSCNVnDYoDCuoeN_HoNcMK5TS0_kWuZm19A5mZQnuQY2yjzoYEPWx-euKkztKNiSPQF8lANF3pnxiFbkmoKUV2kRhaJcjIZuawWwFcTscT_vVqUYPX1GYRmnR_J3AfliXVUBg0uj2Sf5grJTD6muG8F36kgeKKaSSIoP1QA%3D%3D)

Sincerely,Darin LaHood

Peter, I believe the fundamental principle of our nation is every American has an equal chance to succeed — get a proper education, find good jobs, and provide for their families.

However, I learned from a young age that not everyone in this country has the same opportunity for the American Dream.

**That’s why I’ve spent my time in Congress trying to level the playing field for people who have been marginalized, underserved, and discriminated against.**

But now the Republican Party has clawed their back to power in the House, and we’re facing an uphill battle. _They’ve already made a plan to decimate LGBTQ+ rights, criminalize abortion, and more._

What’s worse, as a steadfast progressive and a gay man of color, **Republicans will make me their top target.**

But Peter, we can stand up to these bullies because **we have something they don’t have: your support.** And that power looks like thousands of grassroots Americans like you chipping in just $1, $5, or $25 to fight for our country.

[**Peter, that’s why I’m coming to you for help: I’m raising $20,000 by the end of the year to ensure we have the funds to counter GOP attacks and fight for progressive priorities. Can I count on you to chip in $1 or anything you can spare to protect our progressive priorities?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56337905/384676193/234291150?amount=1&refcode=MTFC_20221223_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODJmMTZlMC0wNjgzLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1186MEPzBy7UuzzZ6vStY6333UMvh72BnNRECMcOkVI=)

clean_body: It only takes $1 | = = | = Peter, I believe the fundamental principle of our nation is every American has an equal chance to succeed — get a proper education, find good jobs, and provide for their families. However, I learned from a young age that not everyone in this country has the same opportunity for the American Dream. That’s why I’ve spent my time in Congress trying to level the playing field for people who have been marginalized, underserved, and discriminated against. But now the Republican Party has clawed their back to power in the House, and we’re facing an uphill battle. They’ve already made a plan to decimate LGBTQ+ rights, criminalize abortion, and more. What’s worse, as a steadfast progressive and a gay man of color, Republicans will make me their top target. But Peter, we can stand up to these bullies because we have something they don’t have: your support. And that power looks like thousands of grassroots Americans like you chipping in just $1, $5, or $25 to fight for our country. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = Thank you so much. I won’t ever stop fighting, Peter. – Mark | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517 www.marktakano.com Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. He's been a voice for veterans, seniors, students, local businesses and hardworking families. But now, Republicans have captured a slim House Majority. The leadership of progressive Democrats like Mark will be critical to holding Republicans accountable and ensuring the healing of our country during this challenging time. name: Joe Shepherd, URD President
subject: The election cycle might be over…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United Rural Democrats](https://click
body:
But we’re hard at work preparing for the new year | | | Peter – This past week, we hosted a retreat with URD staff and volunteers in northern Illinois. It was great getting to catch up with our team and connect with the dedicated volunteers who helped so many folks win their elections this year. During our retreat, we celebrated this year’s successes, reflected on what we can do better next time, and set our goals for 2023. I love our URD team and I’m so grateful for their help and commitment to our mission. Connecting with other people who are just as dedicated as I am to electing rural Democrats is extremely gratifying and energizing. We share a common goal of helping better the lives of Americans in rural areas. There’s no other feeling like sharing a goal and working every day to make it a reality. Here are a few snapshot of us (and Joe’s new Fetterman Christmas sweater!): [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2GcF-Gkr84aEyP5Te754tJDQUruIwiVcUiQaQvgXoiPqXoUO6a2tUTNsXAg0ygrT7vIs9GkvRc7zgX-d92AhMXdPF3KRS-CT-dvZBi0mAQJBkUDEarxVoLsiSoZUkXYEJF2fv9-_gZVS5FgcXa0rrpUiks3kRKPXxhnb35JJU9_URwwylQjYMSWcN3UQAwgD_KAspLa5Wj_tA8sUpCulNk5KduwbgZ5_vFQvzt2XeCLSoVcwRIdqNMLUa8J2WRCFXxu8EMonRgNDWP4hdOR1UcZrKw4UksaE4szfqzyYz9Dvp7KceO1S_r0J8IjCsriXCz2a7IZsqDIqqmFJOKX2-w1rA/3s8/rk6OqaMtQTidOfLENsdp4w/h0/4gHBHPfQ5i_CTZ_j8GbYDhwigZLVNcJU0NVER1w6Srs) _A few of our volunteers striking a pose for the camera._

clean_body: But we’re hard at work preparing for the new year | | | Peter – This past week, we hosted a retreat with URD staff and volunteers in northern Illinois. It was great getting to catch up with our team and connect with the dedicated volunteers who helped so many folks win their elections this year. During our retreat, we celebrated this year’s successes, reflected on what we can do better next time, and set our goals for 2023. I love our URD team and I’m so grateful for their help and commitment to our mission. Connecting with other people who are just as dedicated as I am to electing rural Democrats is extremely gratifying and energizing. We share a common goal of helping better the lives of Americans in rural areas. There’s no other feeling like sharing a goal and working every day to make it a reality. Here are a few snapshot of us (and Joe’s new Fetterman Christmas sweater!): A few of our volunteers striking a pose for the camera. We mapped out all the trips I took in 2022 to help rural Democrats win their elections. Finally, we celebrated our hard work this year with a day in the city. Downtown Chicago is beautiful at this time of year! Our retreat was possible thanks to contributions form supporters like you, Peter. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: Happy holidays from me and the URD team! Joe Shepherd, President of United Rural Democrats United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: From my family to yours: Happy holidays
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
Sherrod Brown - Senator from Ohio [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87645/images/brown_2018_logo-outlined.png]
As we enter the holiday season and approach the New Year, I’m looking forward to time at home with Connie and our family. Of course, Franklin and Walter are looking forward to any table scraps they can find. I hope you and your loved ones have a happy and restful holiday season, too.
This has been a year of challenges but also great progress. Everything we’ve achieved is a testament to the dedication and generosity of supporters like you.
What you did this year mattered. Because of everyone who voted, volunteered, and donated, we were able to defend our Senate majority and elect champions for the Dignity of Work across the country, up and down the ballot.
You’ve given so much to our movement, but today, I’m asking you to direct your generosity toward your community. Too many in our country are struggling to pay rent, buy groceries, or afford a new winter coat.
With that in mind, I hope you’ll consider donating to the National Diaper Bank Network [https://nationaldiaperbank.app.neoncrm.com/forms/general-donation] -- an organization that’s special to Connie and me -- or a local food bank near you. [https://www.feedingamerica.org/find-your-local-foodbank] These groups are providing critical aid to families in need.
Thank you -- and from my family to yours: Have a safe, healthy, and happy holiday.
With gratitude,
Sherrod
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
Contributions or gifts to Friends of Sherrod Brown are not tax deductible.

Ste. 289
Akron, OH 44333

Peter,

As my family gathers to celebrate this special season, I'm reminded of all the families who welcomed me into their homes this year and supported our campaign for governor in so many meaningful ways.

I'm thinking of every parent, grandparent, neighbor or teacher who shared their hopes and concerns, and trusted me with their stories.

Thank you, again, for your steadfast support. Next year our work to improve Oklahoma will continue anew.

Until then, may the joy and light of Christmas find you and your family.

\-- Joy

name: Lisa Blunt Rochester
subject: Happy Holidays
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
body:
Today, I’m thinking of all of you.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56338344/384677684/1956491157?refcode=EM_C_221221Holiday_C_LBR_ALL_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDNjZTRmMi0wOTgzLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EQwJJw-yudV9KAsnsNal6IOCRwemWnNlvJBSOWkkplA=&emci=efe8e333-db82-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=803ce4f2-0983-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=11913588) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56338345/384677685/1956491157?refcode=EM_C_221221Holiday_C_LBR_ALL_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDNjZTRmMi0wOTgzLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EQwJJw-yudV9KAsnsNal6IOCRwemWnNlvJBSOWkkplA=&emci=efe8e333-db82-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=803ce4f2-0983-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=11913588) I’d like to wish you and your family a happy and safe holiday season.

As I take this time to reflect on the past year, I can’t help but feel overcome with joy at how much we’ve achieved. With your help, we did the impossible — defending our democracy despite all odds and proving once more that the power of the people lives on.

Through every single trial, I had you to lean on, and I am so grateful for your dedication to this cause. This year, for many of us, was a challenge, but together, we have overcome, creating something special and worth all of the hard work, sweat, and tears.

As you take this time to spend with your loved ones, know that you are on our minds and that we are incredibly grateful for all you’ve done to show your support and care. Have an amazing holiday!

No matter how you contributed to this movement, I want to offer my most sincere thanks. You have been an amazing addition to this team, and I am so grateful to have you along for this ride as we stay true to our values and move our country forward.

Peace and blessings to all of you,
Lisa 🧡 ** ** ** ** ** ** ** ** ** ** Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress

Wilmington, DE 19810

clean_body: Today, I’m thinking of all of you. I’d like to wish you and your family a happy and safe holiday season. As I take this time to reflect on the past year, I can’t help but feel overcome with joy at how much we’ve achieved. With your help, we did the impossible — defending our democracy despite all odds and proving once more that the power of the people lives on. Through every single trial, I had you to lean on, and I am so grateful for your dedication to this cause. This year, for many of us, was a challenge, but together, we have overcome, creating something special and worth all of the hard work, sweat, and tears. As you take this time to spend with your loved ones, know that you are on our minds and that we are incredibly grateful for all you’ve done to show your support and care. Have an amazing holiday! No matter how you contributed to this movement, I want to offer my most sincere thanks. You have been an amazing addition to this team, and I am so grateful to have you along for this ride as we stay true to our values and move our country forward. Peace and blessings to all of you, Lisa 🧡 Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress PO BOX 9767 Wilmington, DE 19810 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

| Dear Peter,

From our family to yours, we wish you and your loved ones a Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays!

I couldn't be more grateful for my loving family, an exceptional team that works tirelessly so I can continue to serve our community, and a coalition of supporters across Virginia and the country.

I'm so proud of the results we've delivered for our community this year - from investing in sustainable energy to lowering the cost of prescription drugs - and I can't wait to see what kind of progress next year will hold. Have a wonderful, safe holiday!

\- Abigail, Adam, Claire, Charlotte, and Catherine

**Peter: Black hair has always been political.** Currently, discriminating against Black hairstyles is still legal in many states — and this week the GOP said the quiet part out loud.

In a turn of events that shocks **_literally NO ONE:_** Senate Republicans are blocking the passage of legislation that would BAN race-based hair discrimination, refusing to take it out of committee.

Let’s be clear: Black hair discrimination is a kitchen table issue for so many of us. _That’s why we’re calling for a MASSIVE show of support._

[We need 10,000 signatures before MIDNIGHT tonight. Sign on NOW to tell the Senate to pass the CROWN Act and end discrimination against Black hair once and for all →](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlGTSSiGcw1YZQj9wfDYZK36rrFvmv-_KWFHn7AfZO7mKHRjAj-PHQwqGxNnrOzH_3UXJo3su6qhq_3n0PBs4qpYtq7W-gxRugkSv0b3gPS9jaCZ9N9tPgm9u8STOeDhhnEdYCsBFxZ3bk3l2bgoUXYtpJH_cj3IveIP358I2bXTDBdwWxYH8mAV48ioClVTfRKgPHIOdDqPdI3JEshpymSCm2nsCOSgQZyR3h7wvxoNov9Yprp57V5bT-pmjnBnVH8dZW6aHAIpd8jn3PS0McyHQf13KQUJrUp4C9H3tmjIi3_jof23Ve2OHP6NAPecWT4EeAoNtNcIDq9krIAymPtyOOFMVLqOb4VIWMNfetYQA/3s8/h2LfGaAaTfyqsk0OwAV3uA/h3/dg5DogCq7FUK379pQ0W5HtwSYJYq4VgmLJN8i9Lps8w)

name: Gwen Moore
subject: Happy Holidays to Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
We cherish this time of year. | | |
---
Peter, It’s the holiday season! I cherish this time of year as we come together as family, friends, neighbors, and communities across Wisconsin and America in both celebration, reflection, and compassion. It’s this time of year we are reminded of what really matters and what potential we can achieve by working together. Let us enjoy hugs, carrying on family traditions to our younger generations, playing in the snow, and reading holiday stories over hot cocoa. As we continue returning to more normal holidays, let us not forget to do our part by getting vaccinated and protecting our most vulnerable. Take a moment to spread the holiday spirit by volunteering your time or donating to a cause that matters to you, and please encourage your loved ones to do the same. With peace, love and much joy, Happy Holidays!
---
Gwen Proudly representing Wisconsin's Fourth Congressional District Proud Co-Lead of the Violence Against Women Act 100% Pro-Choice Stay Connected! Text "GWEN" to 313131 for campaign updates!
---
|
---
The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92.

clean_body: We cherish this time of year. | | | Peter, It’s the holiday season! I cherish this time of year as we come together as family, friends, neighbors, and communities across Wisconsin and America in both celebration, reflection, and compassion. It’s this time of year we are reminded of what really matters and what potential we can achieve by working together. Let us enjoy hugs, carrying on family traditions to our younger generations, playing in the snow, and reading holiday stories over hot cocoa. As we continue returning to more normal holidays, let us not forget to do our part by getting vaccinated and protecting our most vulnerable. Take a moment to spread the holiday spirit by volunteering your time or donating to a cause that matters to you, and please encourage your loved ones to do the same. With peace, love and much joy, Happy Holidays! Gwen Proudly representing Wisconsin's Fourth Congressional District Proud Co-Lead of the Violence Against Women Act 100% Pro-Choice Stay Connected! Text "GWEN" to 313131 for campaign updates! | The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92. = | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress Gwen Moore for Congress P.O. **_“_**** _For to us a child is born,_****__****_to us a son is given, and the government will be on his shoulders. And he will be called Wonderful Counselor, Mighty God,_** **_ _****_Everlasting Father, Prince of Peace._****_” _**_Isaiah 9:6_ Friend, This is my favorite time of the year. We get to reflect on all of life’s blessings and share special memories with our friends and family – and it’s all because of His sacrifice. On behalf of me and my family, I want to wish you a very Merry Christmas and a safe New Year.

Every single Republican should vote NO on the ludicrous, unacceptable 1.7 TRILLION dollar Omnibus spending bill. It’s a disaster for our country. And it also happens to be a disaster for the Republican Party because they can stop it. Biden and the Radical Democrats are trying to ram through this monstrosity in the dark of night, when no one has even had a chance to read it. It’s over 4,000 pages crammed with left-wing disasters, Washington betrayals, and special interest sellouts—all designed to keep the corruption going without lifting a single finger to solve the problems that matter to hardworking families and Americans. The bill provides $1.9 billion dollars for so-called “border management,” to process illegal aliens and release them into our country—but it incredibly prohibits those funds from ever being used for Border SECURITY, to prevent illegal aliens from coming in in the first place. And most importantly, we’re giving $500 million dollars to other countries for border security and for the building of walls. Can you believe this? But we’re not allowed to use any money for border security or the building of walls. This bill will make the BORDER worse. It will make CRIME worse. It will make the ECONOMY worse. It will make INFLATION worse. It will make EVERY SINGLE ONE of Joe Biden’s total catastrophes even more ruinous and damaging to our country. Our country is going to hell because of what they’ve done in the last two years.

Passing a spending bill now, before Republicans take control of Congress on January 3rd, would squander our best chance to hold Biden fully accountable and force him to secure the border in the new year. Mitch McConnell, who is an absolute disaster by the way, must not be allowed to waste this golden opportunity. He’s more of a Democrat than a Republican. What he’s doing to this party is incredible and what he’s doing to our nation is incredible. Call your Congressmen and Senators right now, and tell them to vote NO on Democrats’ massive left-wing spending bill. And they have to do it now. Vote no.

Trump December 22nd, 2022 Transcript: Every single Republican should vote NO on the ludicrous, unacceptable 1.7 TRILLION dollar Omnibus spending bill. It’s a disaster for our country. And it also happens to be a disaster for the Republican Party because they can stop it. Biden and the Radical Democrats are trying to ram through this monstrosity in the dark of night, when no one has even had a chance to read it. It’s over 4,000 pages crammed with left-wing disasters, Washington betrayals, and special interest sellouts—all designed to keep the corruption going without lifting a single finger to solve the problems that matter to hardworking families and Americans. The bill provides $1.9 billion dollars for so-called “border management,” to process illegal aliens and release them into our country—but it incredibly prohibits those funds from ever being used for Border SECURITY, to prevent illegal aliens from coming in in the first place. And most importantly, we’re giving $500 million dollars to other countries for border security and for the building of walls. Can you believe this? But we’re not allowed to use any money for border security or the building of walls. This bill will make the BORDER worse. It will make CRIME worse. It will make the ECONOMY worse. It will make INFLATION worse. It will make EVERY SINGLE ONE of Joe Biden’s total catastrophes even more ruinous and damaging to our country. Our country is going to hell because of what they’ve done in the last two years. Passing a spending bill now, before Republicans take control of Congress on January 3rd, would squander our best chance to hold Biden fully accountable and force him to secure the border in the new year. Mitch McConnell, who is an absolute disaster by the way, must not be allowed to waste this golden opportunity. He’s more of a Democrat than a Republican. What he’s doing to this party is incredible and what he’s doing to our nation is incredible. Call your Congressmen and Senators right now, and tell them to vote NO on Democrats’ massive left-wing spending bill. And they have to do it now. Vote no. | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- We are up against the FAKE NEWS media, their Democrat Partners, and Big Tech who all want to see us FAIL. We need to do whatever it takes to get the TRUTH out. Thank you, Donald J Trump 45th President of the United States P.S. Text TRUMP to 88022 to receive direct updates from yours truly. I'll be sending a text soon, so don't wait. name: Susan Wild
subject: ❄️Happy Holidays! ❄️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
In tough times, I am endlessly impressed by the strength, resilience, and solidarity of the American people.

| Peter,

I wanted to take a moment to wish you and your family a happy holiday season!

It’s been an eventful year for our nation. In Congress, we passed historic legislation like the Inflation Reduction Act and the Respect for Marriage Act, advocating for American families and workers even as the conservative-majority Supreme Court ruled to roll back basic reproductive health care rights.

I faced the toughest re-election race of my career, and thanks to the power of this team, I successfully defended my seat and will be returning to Congress in January to continue fighting for our communities.

In tough times, I am endlessly impressed by the strength, resilience, and solidarity of the American people.

However you celebrate this season, I hope you are able to find moments of peace and joy with your loved ones. I look forward to continuing our work together through the new year.

With gratitude,
Susan
---

subject: Thank the January 6th Committee!

body:
| **BREAKING: The GOP launches brutal attacks on the January 6th Committee after the Committee suggested criminals charges for Trump**

**[**We're sending a letter to the January 6th Committee thanking them for their brave work and we need your signature! We only have 460 more spots open for top Democrats to sign – sign right now! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37723?t=6&akid=5912%2E878179%2EhZDgAs)** | [DONATE $5 RIGHT NOW AND SIGN THE THANK YOU LETTER »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37723?t=7&akid=5912%2E878179%2EhZDgAs)
---
**To: The January 6th Committee
From: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37723?t=8&akid=5912%2E878179%2EhZDgAs)**

Dear January 6th Committee,

Exposing Donald Trump’s involvement in the January 6th attempted insurrection is saving our Democracy.

I know that persevering through brutal attacks from Trump’s MAGA stooges in Congress wasn’t easy.

But, spending countless hours combing over evidence to find the truth about that horrific day was crucial work.

Last week, you made me proud to be an American.

I’m so proud that we have leaders like YOU who are working to give the American people the truth about the attack on our Democracy.

**The bravery you’ve shown in standing up for what’s right will go down in history.**

Despite the attacks you’ve endured and the censorship you’ve received, you’ve never wavered.

**So thank you. Our country is better because of your leadership.** [**Today, I’m signing this letter and making a donation to VPP to keep electing leaders like you all.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37723?t=9&akid=5912%2E878179%2EhZDgAs) | [DONATE $5 TO SIGN THE LETTER »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37723?t=10&akid=5912%2E878179%2EhZDgAs)
---
Sincerely,

A Grateful Democrat
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=5912%2E878179%2EhZDgAs). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=5912%2E878179%2EhZDgAs).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=5912%2E878179%2EhZDgAs) to request fewer emails. name: =?utf-8?Q?Michael=20Maher=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Merry Christmas and a happy New Year!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/maherforcongress/merry-christmas?e=1722d05e10)
---
| |
---
| | December 23, 2022

Dear Friend,

The most wonderful part of the holiday season is spending time with your loved ones. As I look back on this past year, I am thankful for your ongoing support and guidance throughout 2022. Wishing you and your family a very merry Christmas filled with joyous memories, peace, and good cheer! May the coming new year bring you and your family good health and happiness. I look forward to what’s in store for us in 2023!
---
| Thank you,

Michael Maher

name: Cristen Wohlgemuth
subject: Feeling deflated by election results?
body:
I’m asking because I’ve heard from many conservatives who are dismayed about the recent elections, | | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8de614ccbca4443a95b1c07f35127650&_e=07EmFmsZ44Cjg7kLCKddgDOl7gcv7Y_PDqtcIJE6nUewRrqG2DN8QPJ5t4DmP3ufehjwA5MVbQmiR3dYwcFnq-r_HFA4IA02c5e8x0V0i7wdJzIJigJqmxkTyDLYfZIcC9hCGQ1f7R0j-SN_yymqJUdske5qxxzBmuuGlCDj99hI0PCz-_z7lB2dSuhKQUggVbDiwuJq9QYokEFyL4c01GE47YUPtI3LjkLRqfa6iNDfiFhM4WrFV3J2kVXt3dayqJNzzcILSl_fUVrQIyGQvjJM02KV_cUjoXFkDcBgHt651B2jU0aBckbY3EKHvEnEB71ieniQfht6_EVy5m1lWQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend of Liberty, How do you feel about the recent election results? I'm asking because I've heard from many conservatives who are dismayed about the recent elections, having hoped for a wave election that could win both houses of Congress. Now, with a divided legislature, we most likely face two years of gridlock. But that doesn't paint the entire picture. Constitutional conservatives like you and I can win victories against the Biden administration right now. **The place we can win right now is in the courts.** That's where, in the last year, our attorneys are winning battles against the Biden administration's attempts to redefine the definition of a firearm, to force pronoun usage in public schools, and to unlawfully tell private landowners what they can and cannot do with their land. The court system is the ultimate safeguard of our constitutional rights. The court system is designed to ensure that the government does not overstep the boundaries of its powers and is held accountable for its actions. **It is essential that we continue to fight to uphold the Constitution and protect our rights, especially since we face unprecedented times as we head into 2023.** Our attorneys are leading the fight to restore and protect your rights against an insatiable, overreaching government. Our attorneys litigate crucial cases at no legal cost to our clients to defend their freedoms. And when we win, you win. If you are frustrated with the state of government in DC, I'd like to ask for your support of our attorneys in courthouses across the western United States. That's where they fight battles to defend your right to own a gun, own land, and speak freely. [**Would you help fund these attorneys, who work countless hours on behalf of our brave clients who are standing up against the Biden administration?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8de614ccbca4443a95b1c07f35127650&_e=07EmFmsZ44Cjg7kLCKddgDOl7gcv7Y_PDqtcIJE6nUewRrqG2DN8QPJ5t4DmP3ufehjwA5MVbQmiR3dYwcFnq-r_HFA4IA02c5e8x0V0i7wdJzIJigJqmxkTyDLYfZIcC9hCGQ1f7R0j-SN_yymqJUdske5qxxzBmuuGlCDj99iz1WxUyd-dnKe30HhXX79cSiQvKEX7A7MbCXjlxSzxlnt5ujgjXOmOGzu00N1_7wIIYiEVVwehsj4NgUThFUGK1v9mtTXyFsHLd57R_hSx2vYDlk4lP8vwwuWvnBY9g1HCujuNR0hEn7PRFHO0qRByzGHPw0jRjuKNEnMn90Cxrw%3D%3D) **Your gift of $25, $50, or even $250 today** can fund an attorney who can WIN battles to defend your Constitutional rights. [**Will you contribute to these efforts by making a gift today?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8de614ccbca4443a95b1c07f35127650&_e=07EmFmsZ44Cjg7kLCKddgDOl7gcv7Y_PDqtcIJE6nUewRrqG2DN8QPJ5t4DmP3ufehjwA5MVbQmiR3dYwcFnq-r_HFA4IA02c5e8x0V0i7wdJzIJigJqmxkTyDLYfZIcC9hCGQ1f7R0j-SN_yymqJUdske5qxxzBmuuGlCDj99ghZcYjDLGSJj0dKIfqdVvLn8FVaQQgXW293fanLUPjVV3ZXxDNAIg77Gsd9YzPFI0dsH2FMn5dk8kpUvtiJINbFmaco2jMvJGlszN063ZCj2HR0nC9FDFQzQJ-M0MbWOA804U-APDqF-u5h4zElwYdmACd0qgWhcmaYF03_REF-Q%3D%3D) Here's the secure link where you can donate to protect your constitutional rights: **[https://mslegal.org/donate/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8de614ccbca4443a95b1c07f35127650&_e=07EmFmsZ44Cjg7kLCKddgDOl7gcv7Y_PDqtcIJE6nUewRrqG2DN8QPJ5t4DmP3ufehjwA5MVbQmiR3dYwcFnq-r_HFA4IA02c5e8x0V0i7wdJzIJigJqmxkTyDLYfZIcC9hCGQ1f7R0j-SN_yymqJUdske5qxxzBmuuGlCDj99hV9wNFSUaEppwu0V_9X6wJIZ3cbc3xnqrkrHzj4W4Xc5ZuLDQbKl3lUUWcucdtHrxpOC_SJICZuxzSQm0oZ-LB72twi60sF0V28FrMWfNCFpd_DW9og6ua8lRFiHeD_rW8L2m8XLBbEfGVe865vzScJuWQ9eGx5-58gZvXvbLDyg%3D%3D)** Your gift will secure a victory to tell the government not to trample on our individual rights, and will show support to your fellow brave Americans who are fighting every day to ensure your liberties are kept intact. For Liberty! Cristen Wohlgemuth President & CEO Mountain States Legal Foundation
---

name: GOP Alerts
subject: Do you have a minute, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate
body:
We need your input >>

|
---
Hi Peter,

Even though Republicans took back the House, November was not the Red Wave we hoped for. name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: Grateful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
---
| | I wanted to tell you personally why I’m so grateful this holiday season. – I’m grateful for the honor of a lifetime to serve as your Speaker of the House and representative from my beloved San Francisco. – I’m grateful for every American who stepped up against anti-democratic extremism to make the 2022 election one for the history books. – I’m grateful for my inspiring Democratic grassroots donors whose hard-earned money helped defy history and elect INCREDIBLE Democrats up and down the ballot. [**_I’m grateful for you, for helping us deliver our legislative accomplishments For The People. But believe me when I say our work is not yet finished. That’s why my 2023 Democratic Membership Drive couldn’t be more important. In order to continue the work we’ve started and make this the ERA of Democratic progress, we need to retake the House and build impenetrable pro-Democracy Majorities. My End of Year Deadline is just 8 days away — but I see you still haven’t had a chance to make a donation and renew your Democratic Membership. So I’m asking you personally if you’ll chip in $15 or whatever you can before midnight to confirm your status as a 2023 Democratic Member. Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives. As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy. ---
Happy Holidays, Peter. As I spend quality time with my family and loved ones, I can’t help but reflect on how grateful I am for everything you’ve done to elect me to represent Illinois’ 17th District. Next year, I’ll be sworn in to represent the community where I was born and raised. But before that, it’s worth stepping back to take stock of what we’ve accomplished. Together, we built a grassroots movement around our shared values and elected the first-ever LGBTQ member of Congress from Illinois. We made history, Peter, thanks to you. No matter how you celebrate, I hope the season is filled with peace, laughter, and rest for you and yours. I’m so thankful to everyone who’s been involved -- in ways large and small -- and I hope you have a restful and enjoyable holiday. All my best, Eric
---
|
---
| Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois
---

Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL running for U.S. Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. Peter, **GOP candidate for Governor Mike Braun is taking an interesting political approach to his 2024 campaign: Admitting his Party’s failure.** Despite having served in elected office for over 10 years, Braun recently admitted that Hoosiers are struggling with high healthcare costs, poor workforce development, a failing education system, and dismal maternal and infant mortality rates. **Do you want to know what’s the common thread with these issues? All of them have happened under Republicans’ watch over the last two decades.** [**We need more Democratic leadership at the local and state levels to clean up the mess Republicans created. Can we count on you for a small contribution today? Every dollar counts.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56326997/384655294/1643342139?refcode=221223-FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjJlNTJjNi1lYjgyLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=25ewM5msvIXZ-nGUioAEY1mU2qXRrY9T75qU-E0QvgY=) As a U.S. Senator, Braun has actively rejected state economic investments, job-creating policies, and critical infrastructure projects - like broadband - needed to create a better future for Hoosier families. name: Sign the Petition (Left Action)
subject: Sign: Tell Congress to ban Trump from ever holding office again (they can do it)
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
## [Tell Congress to ban Trump from ever holding office again (they can do it)](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfffb2009-cb26-4b9d-a218-dee1b2a27c8f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbcbc0574-6c17-4e5b-b9e5-76c1927f3c27/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Trump has already decided to run in 2024, and we need to ensure he never sets foot in the White House again. The report of the January 6th committee agrees with that, as do most Americans. [**We need Congress to BAN Trump from holding office ever again. Congress has the power to do it.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta94bed05-4e04-4d01-8e82-1d7ad57133ef/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Under Section 3 of the 14th Amendment, "No person shall be a Senator or Representative in Congress... or hold any office...who, having previously taken an oath...to support the Constitution of the United States, shall have engaged in insurrection or rebellion against the [Constitution]." Democrats would overwhelmingly support this. And if Republicans don't, then keep up the pressure, and force these cowards to explain again and again why they are defending a monster. [**Sign your name: Demand Congress invoke the 14th Amendment and BAN Trump from office**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3ea73820-d9c1-4dff-b993-bb20729b2c6f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _(Already took this action? Forward it to friends so we can maximize the impact! Want to unsubscribe? See link at bottom_
---
| | | | [SIGN YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdb970ea3-771c-4af7-8d3a-8f310b4c45ae/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
