clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | Trump has already decided to run in 2024, and we need to ensure he never sets foot in the White House again. The report of the January 6th committee agrees with that, as do most Americans. Under Section 3 of the 14th Amendment, "No person shall be a Senator or Representative in Congress... or hold any office...who, having previously taken an oath...to support the Constitution of the United States, shall have engaged in insurrection or rebellion against the [Constitution]." Democrats would overwhelmingly support this. And if Republicans don't, then keep up the pressure, and force these cowards to explain again and again why they are defending a monster. name: Build Alaska's Future
subject: Before you log off for the Holidays
body:
| | |
---
| | Dear Friend, We can all agree that with so many emails and texts lighting up our phones and inboxes, it’s nearly impossible to keep up, so we have committed to pausing our fundraising emails until March. While you may not be hearing from us directly, [Build Alaska’s Future](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56339570/384682753/310090478?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmMwZWJhOS0xNzgzLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ztTY0ozBToanxeSAx97t2jBnRk7ztepJtJE-TDPRTM0=&emci=08a4c719-1583-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=b6c0eba9-1783-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=9512399) will continue preparing for 2024 and building a coalition to support pro-democracy and common-sense candidates.
---
| | INVEST IN BUILD ALASKA’S FUTURE
---
The public is becoming increasingly wary of institutions, and trusted resources are limited, which is why our organization is so important. [Build Alaska’s Future](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56339571/384682754/310090478?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmMwZWJhOS0xNzgzLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ztTY0ozBToanxeSAx97t2jBnRk7ztepJtJE-TDPRTM0=&emci=08a4c719-1583-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=b6c0eba9-1783-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=9512399) is a trusted voice in the sea of noise, and we will continue engaging in federal political activities, committing every dollar you give to supporting the ultimate goal of keeping extremists out of office and promoting a transparent conversation in the public sphere. Your support in 2022 played a role in the successful re-elections of Senator Lisa Murkowski and Representative Mary Peltola, Alaska’s two pro-infrastructure and pro-democracy candidates. Your support also made the [Build Alaska’s Future education initiative](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56339572/384682755/-1512324198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmMwZWJhOS0xNzgzLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ztTY0ozBToanxeSAx97t2jBnRk7ztepJtJE-TDPRTM0=&emci=08a4c719-1583-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=b6c0eba9-1783-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=9512399) possible, giving everyday Alaskans trustworthy information about federal infrastructure funding. Yet, there is still work to do to rally reasonable Americans who believe in our fundamental rights and our Democracy. That’s why I’m reaching out to you before we log off for the holidays: **[I’m asking you to invest in Build Alaska’s Future Action Fund’s mission](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56339573/384682756/310090478?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmMwZWJhOS0xNzgzLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ztTY0ozBToanxeSAx97t2jBnRk7ztepJtJE-TDPRTM0=&emci=08a4c719-1583-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=b6c0eba9-1783-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=9512399).** We’ve set a critical end-of-year fundraising goal to support our work to promote transparent public discourse and preserve democracy. This is the last time you’ll hear from us this year, and until March, so please take the opportunity to [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56339584/384682762/310090478?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmMwZWJhOS0xNzgzLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ztTY0ozBToanxeSAx97t2jBnRk7ztepJtJE-TDPRTM0=&emci=08a4c719-1583-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=b6c0eba9-1783-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=9512399)!
---
HELP US REACH OUR END OF YEAR GOAL
---
Thanks for all your support in 2022! We look forward to engaging with you in 2023, and in the meantime, feel free to contact us anytime. Happy Holidays!

clean_body: | | | | | Dear Friend, We can all agree that with so many emails and texts lighting up our phones and inboxes, it’s nearly impossible to keep up, so we have committed to pausing our fundraising emails until March. While you may not be hearing from us directly, will continue preparing for 2024 and building a coalition to support pro-democracy and common-sense candidates. | | INVEST IN BUILD ALASKA’S FUTURE The public is becoming increasingly wary of institutions, and trusted resources are limited, which is why our organization is so important. is a trusted voice in the sea of noise, and we will continue engaging in federal political activities, committing every dollar you give to supporting the ultimate goal of keeping extremists out of office and promoting a transparent conversation in the public sphere. Your support in 2022 played a role in the successful re-elections of Senator Lisa Murkowski and Representative Mary Peltola, Alaska’s two pro-infrastructure and pro-democracy candidates. Your support also made the possible, giving everyday Alaskans trustworthy information about federal infrastructure funding. Yet, there is still work to do to rally reasonable Americans who believe in our fundamental rights and our Democracy. That’s why I’m reaching out to you before we log off for the holidays: . We’ve set a critical end-of-year fundraising goal to support our work to promote transparent public discourse and preserve democracy. This is the last time you’ll hear from us this year, and until March, so please take the opportunity to ! HELP US REACH OUR END OF YEAR GOAL Thanks for all your support in 2022! We look forward to engaging with you in 2023, and in the meantime, feel free to contact us anytime. Happy Holidays! | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Katie Porter
subject: My end of year letter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
body:
As I’m reflecting on the year we’ve had and all we have accomplished, I can help but feel so grateful for every single Porter Supporter.
Derek,
Happy Holidays! As I’m reflecting on the year we’ve had and all we have accomplished, I can't help but feel so grateful for every single Porter Supporter. So here it is, my official holiday letter:
**We won a tough, toss-up race, even though Republicans spent nearly $10 million to try and keep us out of Congress.**
* I outperformed every other Democrat on the ballot here in CA-47, and that’s because our robust campaign won the support of Democrats, Republicans, and independent voters.
* We knocked 125,000 doors and reached 640,000 people on the phone. We ran a ton of ads—my kids were extremely ready to not see my face on TV, the internet, and on bus shelters.
* We were able to make last minute TV ad buys as the race tightened, thanks to your support.

**In Congress, my priority is always to stand up to special interests and deliver for California families. A few highlights:**
* My legislation to **lower drug prices** was included in the Inflation Reduction Act and signed into law.
* We made historic progress addressing climate change, and my bill to raise fees on polluters was also signed into law.
* I introduced legislation to **crack down on corruption In Congress:** banning Members of Congress from trading stocks, requiring better transparency when Members of Congress travel on the taxpayers’ dime, and requiring Members to publicly disclose their meetings and legislative activity.

**Our campaign continued to be people-powered. We won without accepting a dime from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists.**
* Our average online donation this cycle was $23.75.
* 80% of our contributions were $25 or less.

I’m so proud of the work our team did this year, and I’m ready to continue fighting for California families.
By the way--**those end of quarter deadlines don’t go away just because the election just happened.** We’ll once again have to publicly report how much we’ve raised. You can power our movement by making a contribution before the end of the year, using this link:
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kpem-1222?refcode=EMAE23_LET_20221223_V1_F](https://act.katieporter.com/go/13991?refcode=EMAE23_LET_20221223_V1_F&t=1&akid=15581%2E3422442%2ELrwW7C)**
Thanks for your support, Derek.
Katie Porter

Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters chipping in to emails just like this one. If you would like to receive fewer emails, please [**click here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp-unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=15581%2E3422442%2ELrwW7C).

To contribute via check, please address to: Katie Porter for Congress, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brian=20Lenney?=
subject: what's coming in January
body:
....................... (also, Merry Christmas).................... |
---
| | “No nation has ever taxed itself into prosperity.”

The late, great (_and dearly missed_) Rush Limbaugh said that.

Yet here we are, in 2022... being taxed to death.

And it's not just nationally, we're feeling it at the state level too.

>From everything I've seen and heard, **_financial freedom is the #1 issue in Idaho_**.

_Property taxes...

Income taxes...

Sales/grocery taxes...

Gas taxes..._

They all need to be fixed (or done away with completely).

So, rest assured, the conservatives in the new Idaho legislature plan on tackling all of these tax issues.

I've already seen a few bills to provide property tax relief and I'll support the effort.

And I myself have a bill to get rid of the grocery tax, AND the tax credit completely (we shouldn't have to pay taxes on sky-high groceries because of a 40-year record high inflation caused by the Democrat's awful, regressive, and backward policies).

**_All Idahoans need relief NOW. _**

Point is, as a conservative, I want to lower the overall tax burden for Idahoans in every way I can.

I have a few bills ready to launch also...
1. One that helps protect parents from medical kidnapping by the state...

2. One that draws a line in the sand and says NO MORE to federal overreach when it comes to masking, vaccine, and lockdown mandates (because: 10th Amendment)...

3. And one that gets rid of ballot initiatives that fringe groups __**have used, are using, and plan to use**__ to completely bypass the legislative process and turn Idaho into the next Oregon or Colorado.

More details on those will be coming VERY soon.

In the meantime, know that there's a block of conservatives, working together, meeting regularly, and moving forward with the intention of making Idaho free again.

Please keep us in your prayers. There's a fight on the horizon and we need them.

Cheers,

Brian Lenney

**P.S.**

School choice is also way up there as a priority. There are a few AWESOME bills I've seen and will support 100%.

Because it's time to give parents and students __**real educational freedom**__.

The support is OVERWHELMING at 74%!!

A [recent poll](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=3323712cd3&e=dea908e0fe "see page 48") found that:

"Three-fourths of school parents say they support ESAs. A wide range of demographic groups also support this policy. An "education savings account" in K–12 education – often called an ESA – establishes for parents a government-authorized savings account with restricted, but multiple uses for educational purposes. Parents can then use these funds to pay for: school tuition; tutoring; online education programs; therapies for students with special needs; textbooks or other instructional materials; or save for future college expenses."

And no, I'm not talking about vouchers, or "school-choice lite."

I'm talking about going BIG, making it universal, and fundamentally changing the way we do education in Idaho.

The reason being... the current system doesn't work.

__It's actively FAILING our students and forcing them to stay trapped in FAILING schools__.

**So, let's make a new one. **

If you want to learn MORE about school choice and the ESA model... [check this out.](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=f35aac2afc&e=dea908e0fe "what's school choice?")

If you already know what it means, support universal school choice in the form of ESAs __for every student (not some_)... _click below to let the house and senate education committee members know how you feel:

- [Senate education committee members](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=91df5fdb12&e=dea908e0fe "Senate Edu Members")

- [House education committee members](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=315ed0c6d0&e=dea908e0fe "House edu members")

If you want to share this email, please FWD it.

If you want to get on my email list or tell someone else how to, [here's the place to do it.](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=c9fb0ab754&e=dea908e0fe "subscribe to Brian Lenney's email newsletter")

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: How I’m spending the holidays
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq32022?refcode=email20220701&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq32022?refcode=email20220701&amount=28]
Friend,
We all have holiday traditions, so I wanted to take a second to explain mine.
Each year, my family and I do our best to spend about a week together, usually within driving distance of one of our homes. This year we’re off on an Americana road trip, starting in Branson, Missouri and ending in Memphis, Tennessee.
I’ve heard a lot from people who have traveled to Branson, a hidden gem in the middle of the country nestled in the heart of the Ozark Mountains. They’ve got all kinds of live entertainment, attractions, and over 6 million twinkling Christmas lights – a true holiday experience from the heartland. One highlight: Christmas at Dolly Parton’s Stampede.
Then we head farther south to Memphis. If you read my emails you know that I’m a bit of a history buff, so between the area’s connection to the Civil Rights movement, famous barbecue, and Graceland – it’s going to be quite the trip for American history and culture!
Before most of us log off through the end of the year, I just wanted to once again say thank you.
I am so grateful for your support: the notes, the calls, the Facebook messages, the advice, the impromptu “Slotkin for Congress” crafts, and more than anything -- for your belief that together, we can get back to two healthy parties that debate policy and substance.
Enjoy these final days of 2022. And for those impacted by this winter storm, stay safe and warm!
Elissa

# [#]
About Elissa
Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan’s 8th district in Congress. In 2022, she was elected to represent Michigan’s newly-drawn 7th district, which covers two-thirds of her existing district. Keep up with Elissa and the latest from the campaign trail on Facebook and Twitter.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Senator=20Brian=20Dahle?=
subject: Merry Christmas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brian Dahle for Governor 2022
body:
We wanted to take a moment to wish you and your family... |
---
| |
---
| Hi ,

Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays! As you can imagine, 2022 has been filled with many new adventures. We ran a statewide governor's race and had the honor of meeting thousands of wonderful Californians along our journey. We are immensely grateful for the support we have received during one of our most eventful years yet. Thank you for YOUR part in our adventure.

Our eldest son, Chase, worked tirelessly on the farm while Brian was campaigning and has been the backbone of our business the entire year. In usual Chase fashion, he took on the new commitments in stride and far exceeded our expectations. He put in long hours while handling payroll and unexpected challenges, and we are so proud of him!

Reagan took time from college this year and provided invaluable support while on the campaign trail. He made us proud campaigning across California, and many saw his thoughtful and pragmatic approach to California's challenges. He's a great listener and an excellent communicator!

Roslyn is quite the trooper! It's never easy being in junior high, let alone when your family is in politics. She is never one to shy away from hard or new things. We're amazed by her! She's doing very well in school and has been playing volleyball. We're still deciding if we should start saving for law school or med school. She's truly captivating and is always dreaming of her future aspirations.

Our family is blessed and feeling especially grateful. With Megan's re-election, we have at least two more years in the Legislature and look forward to continuing to serve.

**_We wish you and your family a blessed and prosperous 2023! _**

Merry Christmas,
Brian, Megan, Chase, Reagan, & Roslyn

---

Friend,
THIS IS URGENT.

I just released a NEW video that unveils my plan to reclaim and preserve free speech for all Americans.
[](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJxlUUFvrCAY_DV60ygKsgcPbc1etm3Sy2tvhIXPlRbQAHbj-_UFs21f8hJCwsx8k2E-6GvS1RThCle57JGgSIhc9ahCqEaoqQ-4aquSko42QLAYDy05d-esra7KlnK2XMv34FazlGI2-dQ3BDcgRwqopWdSxSHSCjp2qKYHWsku1_0UwuKz5i5Dx3g8iNVBGe0cyGSSMP4JBTfglODF-6xsKMbVSseVV_ZSRJFRIQBE6egACr8AiKn4VBLm4px8m6NLvi7Ks2aIAaOWmNnCxhYN8gK_KDfzakN84yq-1mCYAalWExEwXGk2jTfcz6sTadIKzWI5TNobI7hZuLrYyH03x_5PpvlqxcT-bY15_m0x2wB7jsQHYGLZnGcdxk1UMKuVTImao_-DXt6E38FJydjk0JLH7eFue3rJXS-Xq9JaedLFJV3SB_bNxIBajVufdfcZQvscQvsS0Km9f3smp9fTUHw8mr_FQHB7TSx6iHfYFviR3lzKvZiEdsMX9-26HA)
Once I am inaugurated as the 47th President of the United States, I will sign an executive order banning any federal department or agency from colluding with any organization, business, or person to censor, limit, categorize, or impede the lawful speech of American citizens.

I will then ban federal money from being used to label domestic speech as ‘mis-‘ or ‘dis-information.’ And I will begin the process of identifying and firing every federal bureaucrat who has engaged in domestic censorship — directly or indirectly — whether they are the Department of Homeland Security, the Department of Health and Human Services, the FBI, or the DOJ, no matter who they are.

I promise to ALWAYS do whatever it takes to PROTECT YOUR FREEDOM OF SPEECH, Friend. Unlike the Democrats, who only want to SILENCE YOU.

With your help, we will WIN in 2024 and take back the White House. I urgently need YOU to stop whatever you’re doing and watch my video. name: Alex Hess, LCV
subject: Cheers to a historic year for climate action. THANK YOU for being a part of it.
body:
__Your support made these HUGE wins possible. |
---

| Peter -- Before we sign off for the holidays, I want to say one thing: **THANK YOU.**

It's because of supporters like you that **2022 has been the most effective year yet for climate action and our movement.**

You helped us press leaders to take bold action on the existential crisis of climate change. You helped build a powerful grassroots coalition that spanned the nation and demanded strong federal climate action, which created the political will for Congress to pass historic legislation. You turned out to vote in the midterm elections, _expanding_ pro-environmental leadership in the Senate.

Here are just a few of our movement's biggest wins from 2022:

**After a decade of work, we passed historic climate legislation -- the Inflation Reduction Act -- into law.**

This year, our nation made truly historic progress to protect people and the planet. In August, Congress passed and President Biden signed into law the Inflation Reduction Act, which contains roughly [$370 billion in transformative investments for clean energy, energy security, and environmental justice.](https://links.messages.lcv.)

The law is the most significant climate bill in our nation's history and the single largest investment the U.S. has made toward solving the climate crisis.

The pundits counted us out -- after the Senate failed to act on climate in 2021, they said we couldn't do it in a contentious election year. _**But you never gave up, and neither did we.**_ It was due to all of your messages and calls to action that Congress ultimately passed this monumental bill.

**You turned out to vote, expanding environmental leadership in the Senate and creating a "green wave" in the states.**

Voter support for candidates who back strong climate action was in abundant evidence this year, as against long odds, political headwinds, and historical trends, voters turned out and delivered a clear victory for climate and democracy in the 2022 elections.

Thanks to your votes, there will be pro-environment leadership in the U.S. Senate next year once again.

And thanks to the work of our state affiliates, there was [a "green wave" in critical state and local elections](https://links.messages.lcv.) -- an outcome that will expand the landscape for state- and local-level climate and clean energy progress across the country.

**We expanded protections for public lands with the historic designation of Camp Hale-Continental Divide National Monument.**

After years of hard work, LCV supporters like you helped secure a big policy win to protect public lands when President Biden designated Camp Hale-Continental Divide National Monument in Colorado.

The first monument designation of President Biden's administration, the Camp Hale-Continental Divide National Monument honors the extensive history of the military and outdoor recreation industry in the region, and will preserve ecological resources and wildlife habitats that are also essential to fighting the climate crisis.

And there's still more conservation progress to come! President Biden announced [he will soon designate Avi Kwa Ame National Monument in Nevada](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/L6b_) -- a direct result of the tireless efforts of tribes, local leaders, and activists who worked collaboratively over the years to carefully craft a boundary that will fully honor the Tribes' proposals. The monument will honor the sacredness of Avi Kwa Ame, or Spirit Mountain, while also supporting the economic growth of surrounding communities.

**All of this -- and more -- is thanks to your support. We are so grateful to you for standing with us.**

From all of us at LCV -- we wish you safe and happy holidays.

Onward,

Alex Hess
Director of Online Engagement
League of Conservation Voters
|

---

You helped build a powerful grassroots coalition that spanned the nation and demanded strong federal climate action, which created the political will for Congress to pass historic legislation. You turned out to vote in the midterm elections, expanding pro-environmental leadership in the Senate. Here are just a few of our movement's biggest wins from 2022: After a decade of work, we passed historic climate legislation -- the Inflation Reduction Act -- into law. This year, our nation made truly historic progress to protect people and the planet. In August, Congress passed and President Biden signed into law the Inflation Reduction Act, which contains roughly The law is the most significant climate bill in our nation's history and the single largest investment the U.S. has made toward solving the climate crisis. The pundits counted us out -- after the Senate failed to act on climate in 2021, they said we couldn't do it in a contentious election year. But you never gave up, and neither did we. It was due to all of your messages and calls to action that Congress ultimately passed this monumental bill. You turned out to vote, expanding environmental leadership in the Senate and creating a "green wave" in the states. Voter support for candidates who back strong climate action was in abundant evidence this year, as against long odds, political headwinds, and historical trends, voters turned out and delivered a clear victory for climate and democracy in the 2022 elections. Thanks to your votes, there will be pro-environment leadership in the U.S. Senate next year once again. And thanks to the work of our state affiliates, there was -- an outcome that will expand the landscape for state- and local-level climate and clean energy progress across the country. We expanded protections for public lands with the historic designation of Camp Hale-Continental Divide National Monument. After years of hard work, LCV supporters like you helped secure a big policy win to protect public lands when President Biden designated Camp Hale-Continental Divide National Monument in Colorado. The first monument designation of President Biden's administration, the Camp Hale-Continental Divide National Monument honors the extensive history of the military and outdoor recreation industry in the region, and will preserve ecological resources and wildlife habitats that are also essential to fighting the climate crisis. And there's still more conservation progress to come! President Biden announced -- a direct result of the tireless efforts of tribes, local leaders, and activists who worked collaboratively over the years to carefully craft a boundary that will fully honor the Tribes' proposals. The monument will honor the sacredness of Avi Kwa Ame, or Spirit Mountain, while also supporting the economic growth of surrounding communities. All of this -- and more -- is thanks to your support. We are so grateful to you for standing with us. From all of us at LCV -- we wish you safe and happy holidays. Onward, Alex Hess Director of Online Engagement League of Conservation Voters | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, . from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback mailto:feedback@lcv.org, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support. |

_Meku! Here are a few_ _important end-of-year updates before we unplug..._
---
**RIGHTS FOR THE HAW RIVER** **** Last week, 7 Directions hosted our first Rights for the Haw River Community Info Session to share about Indigenous-led Rights of Nature and our 2023 initiative to advance Rights of Nature legislation for the Haw in the NC General Assembly. **** [Here is the livestream](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/A7GQnnr_XzUYyessq5BiRMgigmeKwn9otAogeU61ztU5poRYyoSPt6iIZxrEoUcGF8xqCMD_TAws4fMkr-LmjPHU3BU0Csvkim2Aas7KNP08D8rqnuPLR2GouH3ZP3z_CPMPuYUg4B97sbJpKi7D8CoS3BE1P5hIjuG7mbNXzwxVb7R6WV-CCcEcAEfxSJPJMUGfVN96TKHpkAB9toxkW6JcHXZJiFmrwYhsrPIYOcy9_6uDliqk0_eP_uGJt0Lh/3s8/1HMwMKj4T22whbWbgHzBrQ/h1/Y4dgW8E7ewMqoz6I0e2PNPLV10psL6oBbf-9bwAUAz0) to rewatch and share [Here is a downloadable version of the Rights of Nature 101 handout](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/8HToISgnFTOc8o1RQ8FP12MH4E6Sf6vQJvE_ojio4YjEDy-R8_zp96iXd20dvD-BzEBrm4Ut_TfrdZRj_cyPvzbnBkUNBvz-GfLGEE0jCvdH_qcphQR01M3iVz2EjSbd1rkiCUiJmh7GgjXP3rkm7kD8E3Ra_kAtumpXjmcvcX6MwEzDNzzJ7VroKvN-EeqrFYreo1ZPWrnQhH1KD6-XYehd0q77eNfXEcOcNs2eHz6sjbtp1lmXRQZZsS9iMOGoHtx6piR336hTthktx3QaQqaVtJ3F57HEP-M_1wqejUI/3s8/1HMwMKj4T22whbWbgHzBrQ/h2/rJfZ9d-NzEUI0D1v3sfS2cw1KLASCrSlNcLl9LzWVBE) [Sign up here](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0g3wdtg9fsYZUCQweLSiUUxlzMVI81DNLdtbxgLvQPXjP5l0sANxEBIx_QLdlea4zBnn2TI8488L8hAUyM4aAiHt_7sXC8ivMoROoG2elAZa2IlCL3KQNvUQ-fDgZ7su76pWNjbixqPNMwuHIStJuU8yWy50yRAJ8LrOTJ_gPPPqXBHZJIXQG0Prk2iokS_UsmoefmmkyfN1_aJJbrKKn19tGzbxG43sKvlXTQA8Q_oBy-fZeyEP1znPewnee_5dTRoesT_C1mQCN08ya-gkOGJc-dW3gxxtqS1qmTYZR9q2ZxrksdgJc9rasb6jYfzMBnDTmePHu6gja2MAWhUZxt0/3s8/1HMwMKj4T22whbWbgHzBrQ/h3/p1M3912sktHA32CboKkf9onVaQaqCQdCYe-qK3gX-cE) to get involved in the movement
---
|
---
**DIRTY DEAL VICTORY** **** We are closing out the year having successfully beaten back the dirty deal’s devastating fossil fuel provisions on three separate votes. This movement is living proof that grassroots pressure works, even in the face of powerful, money-driven forces at the top. Thank you for the work you have done, and for sticking with us through this long fight. **** In 2023, we will continue to co-lead the fight against any federal actions that threaten communities, and our Great Grandmother Earth. To stay updated, make sure to follow: **** 7 Directions on |
---
|
---
_In Winter, the natural laws demand rest, introspection, recovery, and reflection. The external noise of colonization demands its own more exploitative form of obedience in the ways of consumption, bills, taxes, and other bizarre obligations... We empathize in this time of walking in multiple worlds..._ _This January, we will go into ourselves and reflect as the days are short and the outside elements force us to internally explore. Our suggestion is to give your best in this Season, as much as you can, to create space for inner work and care.__This takes trust that the external will work itself out, and we can build such trust by leaning on our communities._ _We will emerge from this period as the days lengthen and the earth's warmth fills our souls._
---
_See you in February!_
---

---
Hey folks-
Before we log off for the winter break this year, I just wanted to reach out from all of us at Young Democrats of America and wish you and your loved ones Happy Holidays and a Happy New Year.
We had an extremely successful 2022. We hosted meetings in both Boise and Buffalo. We hosted a fundraiser at the DNC Meetings in Washington, DC. We raised record high numbers of Grassroots donations for this organization and our chapters played pivotal roles in battleground races around the country. We could not be more thankful for all of you and all of your support.
2022 was the year that we proved that the Youth Vote mattered and as we reflect, we realize how fortunate we are to have dedicated young activists doing the hard work across this nation. This holiday season, take time for yourself and rest because the work for 2023 and 2024 starts in just a couple weeks.
We’re looking forward to all of the goals we’ll accomplish together in 2023.
See you all next year,
Quentin Wathum-Ocama
_YDA President_

| **_**The Young Democrats of America (YDA) is the official youth wing of the Democratic Party of the United States and the oldest partisan youth organization in the country. From the INDems family to yours, we wish you Happy Holidays and a Merry Christmas to those who celebrate! Please have a safe, joyous, and healthy holiday. ___2024 will mark 20 years since Mitch Daniels and Indiana Republicans came into power. Since then, Indiana’s future has diminished due to the GOP’s partisan agenda._ clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party’s weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. From the INDems family to yours, we wish you Happy Holidays and a Merry Christmas to those who celebrate! Please have a safe, joyous, and healthy holiday. _2024 will mark 20 years since Mitch Daniels and Indiana Republicans came into power. Since then, Indiana’s future has diminished due to the GOP’s partisan agenda. Under Republicans’ watch, Hoosiers have an and the state has a , a , the , and the . Who Started It All: Mitch Daniels. Mitch Daniels spent eight years as Indiana’s governor diminishing the state’s future under the disguise of partisan whataboutism. Daniels , he , and was one of the most well known in the country. Mitch Daniels is the reason why Indiana’s brain drain is in overdrive and why the state has been in the race to the bottom. It’s past time to fix the INGOP’s mess. It begins by electing Democrats up-and-down the ballot in 2023 and 2024 to give Indiana some common sense leadership. **Eric Holcomb Calls for Teacher Pay Raise (Again), INGOP Prioritizes Another Culture War This week, INDems called out Governor Eric Holcomb for providing educators this to educators: he wants them to have a pay raise. The problem: Governor Holcomb has often promised to act on teacher pay, and every year, Indiana Republicans put their extremist agenda before fixing the state’s education system. Here’s a track record of Republicans’ broken promises on teacher pay: Indiana Gov. Eric Holcomb proposes pumping brakes on teacher pay, cutting performance bonuses : Indiana Gov. Eric Holcomb says again wait a year on teacher pay boost : Holcomb to review teacher pay report, stops short of making a commitment to raise salaries : “While Holcomb is calling for modest increases in the state’s K-12 spending, his proposal does not include anything specifically related to teacher pay. Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. Senator Rodney Pol is right - workplace pregnancy accommodations are a no-brainer. This common-sense policy would improve Indiana’s dismal maternal mortality rate. Why it matters: The GOP supermajority has shown no interest in protecting Hoosier women. Indiana Democrats are ready to stand up to the GOP’s extremism and deliver a better future for them and their families. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20DNC=20Coalitions=20Team?=
subject: Wishing Everyone a Happy Holiday!
body:
| | | |
---
| | | As we head into the New Year, the DNC Coalitions Team wants to say happy holidays! Thank you for all the incredible work we did in 2022 to help elect and support Democrats up and down the ballot. The Biden-Harris coalition kept the Senate Blue and passed bills like the Respect for Marriage Act and PACT Act. Democrats are making strides and repeatedly proving that we win when we center our communities.

We know there is still more work left to do, but are so grateful for what we have accomplished - and for _you_ and your continued support. Sending tidings of joy, love, and blessings into 2023 and beyond.
---
|
---
| | | _Copyright © 2022 DNC Community Engagement, All rights reserved._
This is a test distribution list.

**Our mailing address is:**
DNC Community Engagement430 S Capitol Street, SEWashington, DC 20003
[Add us to your address book](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/vcard?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/profile?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126&e=d6c5c7d7ec&c=4a48bf940c) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126&e=d6c5c7d7ec&c=4a48bf940c).

[](http://www.mailchimp.com/email-referral/?utm_source=freemium_newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=referral_marketing&aid=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&afl=1)

| | | Hi Friend, its South Dakota Governor Kristi Noem!

As an unapologetic Conservative, the Fake News media has said a lot about me these last few years, but now I'm ready to set the record straight and tell my story in my own words.

**And that 's why I'm so excited to offer you an exclusive copy of my new memoir _Not My First Rodeo_.** Plus, if you claim your copy today, I'll even sign it, Friend.

But here's the thing -- I am only offering this exclusive opportunity to a very limited number of conservative supporters. So this might be your only chance to claim your very owned signed copy.

subject: Rep. Liz Cheney SLAMS Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| **BREAKING: Rep. Liz Cheney, in opening statement, says Trump "is unfit for any office"**

Experts say that Liz Cheney's criticism of Trump has dropped her approval rating even lower with Republicans but sent it skyrocketing with Democrats. [**So we need to hear from our most informed Democrats:**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/liz-cheney-approval/?source=VPP_20221223_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=6&akid=5914%2E878179%2Em_dvYB) | [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/liz-cheney-approval/?source=VPP_20221223_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=7&akid=5914%2E878179%2Em_dvYB) | [YES »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/liz-cheney-approval/?source=VPP_20221223_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=8&akid=5914%2E878179%2Em_dvYB)
---

[UNSURE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/liz-cheney-approval/?source=VPP_20221223_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=10&akid=5914%2E878179%2Em_dvYB)
* * *
_*YOU ARE**ONE OF 150 TOP DEMOCRATS** SELECTED FOR THIS VITAL ONE CLICK POLL. PLEASE, ANSWER HONESTLY BEFORE MIDNIGHT!*_
_Here are three important facts you need to know about Liz Cheney:_

**FACT:** Liz Cheney bucked her party to hold Donald Trump accountable.

**FACT:** Cheney just lost her primary election to Trump's hand-picked candidate.

**FACT:** Liz Cheney is still working hard as a part of the January 6th Committee.

Rep. Cheney's declaration that she might change parties has stunned us.
[**So, as one of our TOP 150 Democrats, we need your input on Liz Cheney! Let us know:**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/liz-cheney-approval/?source=VPP_20221223_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=11&akid=5914%2E878179%2Em_dvYB)

Thank you,

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=5914%2E878179%2Em_dvYB). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=5914%2E878179%2Em_dvYB).**

name: Jennifer-Ruth Green
subject: Merry Christmas, Friends!
body:
Friends, As the holiday season approaches, I want to take a moment to thank you for your strong support this year and to wish you
a very merry Christmas.

Jennifer-Ruth Green for Congress [http://email.email.jennifer-ruth.com/c/eJxskM1q4zAUhZ9G2o2Rrn4sL7TIYkwCw8AQpoFuwrUkK2plW7VcQt6-xKsuur18fPec467J2_54OD3q7_fzWf37W1DMp3yh3ho2MPA0WK5bbgSYFmiYMOXr9ijBOpwKpjh_uz1lWqAaodWdUMHhgFp5FME7erNMdOPYGY1CA7ROSoQOW9DIpR6YAJosMAAOIAAY59AYhSIoxRTqjnPOiWT7t-YtzHMaw_pr_dxujVsmmu1t20ol4kCgJ9DXbVkxhiYuS8wBS6pPjEA_1VhnvxLowx93fB1PH3CPF_lY72b4__IEgk9IoN-bMCYlM44Nzms-eoO6bcocaV726X5S0NX6ck85p6pbIlncE7tl-goAAP__Ngpymw]

Friends,

As the holiday season approaches, I want to take a moment to thank you for your strong support this year and to wish you a very
merry Christmas. It was an honor to serve as your Republican congressional nominee and I am grateful for the trust you placed in
me.

As we come together with our loved ones to celebrate this joyous occasion, let us also remember those in need and do our part to
help those less fortunate. I am confident that together we can make a difference in our community.

In His service,

Jennifer-Ruth Green

clean_body: Friends, As the holiday season approaches, I want to take a moment to thank you for your strong support this year and to wish you a very merry Christmas. Jennifer-Ruth Green for Congress [] Friends, As the holiday season approaches, I want to take a moment to thank you for your strong support this year and to wish you a very merry Christmas. It was an honor to serve as your Republican congressional nominee and I am grateful for the trust you placed in me. As we come together with our loved ones to celebrate this joyous occasion, let us also remember those in need and do our part to help those less fortunate. I am confident that together we can make a difference in our community. In His service, Jennifer-Ruth Green Download My 2022 Christmas Card [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] Jennifer-Ruth Green is a member of the Air Reserve Component of the U.S. Air Force. Team, the stakes were incredibly high this past November. Across the country, map manipulators, election deniers, and even _literal insurrectionists_ ran for key offices that would have granted them power over our elections.

**Thanks to this grassroots team, the NDRC helped _defeat_ many of these extreme candidates and elect Democracy Defenders: Now, Attorney General Eric Holder is calling on us to continue this democracy-saving work:** | **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56338474/384678741/-540275122?amount=30&refcode=20221223.1a_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkwNWYxMTI5LTBkODMtZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kjGNPGesP9VGJBbW6C9wJ0URRxhwEWZ-syr-P9mxMpg=)**

**As the old saying goes, “There’s no rest for the wicked” – and Republicans certainly aren’t taking a break from their efforts to undermine our democracy.**
→ In states like Wisconsin, far-right mega donors are bankrolling efforts to elect state supreme court judges who they believe will rubber-stamp their anti-democratic agenda.

→ At the national level, conservatives are supporting lawsuits that could give Republican legislatures unchecked power to gerrymander, restrict voting rights, and overturn the results of presidential elections.

→ And across the country, Republicans have signaled that they no longer view redistricting as a once-a-decade event – instead, they intend to _continue_ manipulating the maps.
**The NDRC is in this fight for the long haul, team, so we’ll continue working to secure fair maps, protect voting rights, and defend democracy. Our work has always been powered by this grassroots team, so we hope we can count on your ongoing support.**
[**_Please: Will you donate today to help the NDRC continue fighting to protect democracy?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56338477/384678744/-540275122?amount=30&refcode=20221223.1a_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkwNWYxMTI5LTBkODMtZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kjGNPGesP9VGJBbW6C9wJ0URRxhwEWZ-syr-P9mxMpg=)

**LOWERING HEALTH CARE COSTS**
Under President Biden’s _Inflation Reduction Act_ , the price of insulin will be capped at $35 a month for seniors on Medicare -- _and not a single Republican voted for it._
Seniors and those on Medicare will see the benefits of these cost-saving measures. The _Inflation Reduction Act_ :
* locks in on average $800 per year lower health care premiums for 13 million Americans,
* lowers seniors’ prescription drug prices, and caps their out-of-pocket expenses for prescription drugs at $2,000 per year,
* and so much more!

**MAKING HISTORY ON THE CIRCUIT COURTS**
Ninety-seven -- That’s the number of Article III judges President Biden and Senate Democrats have confirmed over the last two years -- including Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson as the first Black woman to serve on the Supreme Court. It also includes 28 circuit court judges and 68 district court judges -- 67% of whom are people of color.
**That’s not all -- President Biden has appointed more public defenders to the circuit courts than any of his predecessors.**

On Tuesday, the U.S. Postal Service (USPS) announced an historic $9.6 billion investment over the next five years to electrify its delivery fleet -- including $3 billion from the _Inflation Reduction Act_.
This investment will sustain reliable mail service to Americans while modernizing the fleet, reducing operating costs, increasing clean air in our neighborhoods, creating jobs, and improving public health.

name: Ro Khanna
subject: Increasing funding for the NLRB is good for workers, but we need to do more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Earlier this week, Congress took steps to
improve conditions for workers nationwide by increasing funding for the
National Labor Relations Board by $25 million in the end-of-year omnibus
bill. It’s the first budget increase the Board has seen in nearly a
decade.

While this is a welcome first step in the fight for workers’ rights, it’s
not enough to meet the challenges faced by the National Labor Relations
Board (NLRB), including a staffing shortage.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8178?t=1011&akid=3844%2E5885482%2E7JT7Sl ]Workers deserve better. Add your name here to demand Congress fully
fund the NLRB in the next reconciliation bill!

The NLRB plays a significant role in ensuring that workers have the
protections they need to organize and engage in collective action. They’ve
offered vital support in a year with more than double the number of union
representation petitions filed and a spike in unfair, often retaliatory
labor practices from major corporations like Starbucks and Amazon.

If we want to do right by workers, we need to give them the tools they
need to succeed.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8178?t=1012&akid=3844%2E5885482%2E7JT7Sl ]Sign if you agree: To give workers a fighting chance, Congress must
fully fund the NLRB in the next reconciliation bill.

The push for stronger labor legislation has been an uphill battle, with
bills like the PRO Act failing in the Senate. The very least we can do is
give an existing agency like the National Labor Relations Board the
funding to meet this new wave in the fight for workers’ rights.

In solidarity,

Ro Khanna

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] Peter Willis, Earlier this week, Congress took steps to improve conditions for workers nationwide by increasing funding for the National Labor Relations Board by $25 million in the end-of-year omnibus bill. It’s the first budget increase the Board has seen in nearly a decade. While this is a welcome first step in the fight for workers’ rights, it’s not enough to meet the challenges faced by the National Labor Relations Board (NLRB), including a staffing shortage. [ ]Workers deserve better. Add your name here to demand Congress fully fund the NLRB in the next reconciliation bill! The NLRB plays a significant role in ensuring that workers have the protections they need to organize and engage in collective action. They’ve offered vital support in a year with more than double the number of union representation petitions filed and a spike in unfair, often retaliatory labor practices from major corporations like Starbucks and Amazon. If we want to do right by workers, we need to give them the tools they need to succeed. [ ]Sign if you agree: To give workers a fighting chance, Congress must fully fund the NLRB in the next reconciliation bill. The push for stronger labor legislation has been an uphill battle, with bills like the PRO Act failing in the Senate. The very least we can do is give an existing agency like the National Labor Relations Board the funding to meet this new wave in the fight for workers’ rights. name: Tom Fitton
subject: Court Victory in California!
body:
Merry Christmas!

[INSIDE JW]

California Appeals Court Upholds Injunctions against Corporate Board
Quotas

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61538&L=28629&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9FOHR1c0xjZnZPZz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=]
This is an important victory for Judicial Watch, as well as
taxpayers and stockholders.

The California Court of Appeal has upheld two
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61538&L=28604&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3RhZ3MvNzI2Mjc2Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=]
injunctions
against California quota requirements for corporate boards.

Earlier this year, two California trial courts had found (here
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61538&L=27378&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY291cnQtZGVjbGFyZXMtdW5jb25zdGl0dXRpb25hbC1jYWxpZm9ybmlhLWdlbmRlci1xdW90YS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE]
and here
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61538&L=27068&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY2EtY291cnQtb3Bpbmlvbi1leHBsYWlucy1oaXN0b3JpYy1ydWxpbmcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==])
state quota mandates for sex, race, ethnicity, and LGBT status
unconstitutional. On December 1, 2022, the California Court of Appeal
denied (here
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61538&L=28605&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NyZXN0LXYtcGFkaWxsYS1vcmRlci0zNzUxMy1iMzIxNzI2Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=]
and here
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61538&L=28606&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NyZXN0LXYtcGFkaWxsYS1hcHBlYWwtb3JkZXItMjc1NjEtYjMyMjI3Ni8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE])
two separate emergency requests by the California Secretary of State
to lift the injunctions.

The California courts again have upheld the core American value of
equal protection under the law. Our taxpayer clients are heroes for
standing up for civil rights against the Left’s pernicious efforts
to undo anti-discrimination protections. Our legal team has helped
protect the civil rights of every American with these successful
lawsuits.
Here’s the background.

We filed a gender quota lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61538&L=14941&F=T&]
in Los Angeles County Superior Court in 2019 on behalf of three
California taxpayers. The lawsuit challenged a 2018 law, Senate Bill
826 (SB 826), which mandated that every publicly held corporation
headquartered in California have at least one director “who
self-identifies her gender as a woman” on its board of directors. We
successfully argued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61538&L=26424&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanVkaWNpYWwtd2F0Y2gtc3Vlcy1jYWxpZm9ybmlhLW92ZXItZ2VuZGVyLXF1b3RhLW1hbmRhdGUtZm9yLWNvcnBvcmF0ZS1ib2FyZHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==]
that the quota for women on corporate boards violates the Equal
Protection Clause of the California Constitution. In May 2022, after a
28-day trial, the Superior Court delivered its verdict
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61538&L=27378&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY291cnQtZGVjbGFyZXMtdW5jb25zdGl0dXRpb25hbC1jYWxpZm9ybmlhLWdlbmRlci1xdW90YS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE]
finding that “S.B. 826’s goal was to achieve general equity or
parity; its goal was not to boost California’s economy, not to
improve opportunities for women in the workplace nor not to protect
California taxpayers, public employees, pensions and retirees.”

In 2020, we filed a separate taxpayer lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61538&L=26922&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctc3Vlcy1jYWxpLXF1b3Rhcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE]
challenging
Assembly Bill 979 (AB 979), which Governor Gavin Newsom signed into
law on September 30, 2020. The bill mandated boards of directors of
California-based, publicly held domestic or foreign corporations to
satisfy racial, ethnicity, sexual preference and transgender status
quotas.

Our lawsuit successfully asked the Superior Court to declare the
diversity quota scheme unconstitutional under California’s equal
protection guarantee and to permanently enjoin its enforcement. On
April 1, 2022, the Superior Court issued a ruling and opinion
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61538&L=27068&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY2EtY291cnQtb3Bpbmlvbi1leHBsYWlucy1oaXN0b3JpYy1ydWxpbmcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==]
striking down AB 979’s diversity quotas and granting a permanent
injunction in favor of our taxpayer clients enjoining the state from
implementing the statute.

EXPOSED: BIDEN ADMINISTRATION FLIGHTS TO MULTIPLE CITIES TO DROP OFF
ALIEN CHILDREN

The Biden administration is delivering unaccompanied alien children
around the country like packages.
We received 16 pages
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61538&L=28614&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaGhzLXVuYWNjb21wYW5pZWQtY2hpbGRyZW4tZmxpZ2h0cy0wMzA0NC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE]
of records from the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS)
detailing the nighttime transportation of unaccompanied alien children
(UAC) by air from Texas to Tennessee, as well as two other flights
making multiple stops across the country.

The Administration for Children and Families, a division of HHS,
produced the records in response to an October 2022 lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61538&L=28357&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYWxpZW4tY2hpbGRyZW4tdHJhbnNwb3J0YXRpb24vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==]
filed
after HHS failed to respond to a May 20, 2021, Freedom of Information
Act (FOIA) request (_Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Health
and Human Services_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61538&L=28339&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaGhzLXVuYWNjb21wYW5pZWQtY2hpbGRyZW4tY29tcGxhaW50LTAzMDQ0Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=]
(No. 1:22-cv-03044)) asking for:

* All documents related to the preparation and logistics involved in
the transportation of Unaccompanied Alien Children (UACs) to and from
Chattanooga’s Wilson Air Center on May 14, 2021.
* All ACF officials’ internal email communications related to the
transportation of UACs to and from Chattanooga’s Wilson Air Center
on May 14, 2021.

The records include a May 15 email
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61538&L=28615&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaGhzLXVuYWNjb21wYW5pZWQtY2hpbGRyZW4tZmxpZ2h0cy0wMzA0NC1wZy0xNi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE]
from a person whose name is redacted to an unnamed person at MVM Inc
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61538&L=28616&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubXZtaW5jLmNvbS9d4oCZcz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=
Office of Refugee Resettlement (ORR)
Transport DFW (Dallas Fort Worth) Command Center detailing charter
flights.

One flight travelling from SAN-OKC-CHA-EWR [San Diego, Oklahoma City,
Chattanooga, Newark airports] via “Swift Air
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61538&L=28617&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9pYWVyb2dyb3VwLmNvbS9pYWVyby1haXJ3YXlzL10s4oCdP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==
which was operating a
Boeing 737 with “148 seats” [likely the number of passengers]. It
indicates that there would be two buses at the San Diego Convention
Center, two buses in Oklahoma City, two buses in Chattanooga, and two
buses at Newark.

A second flight, from MFE-ELP-EWR [McAllen, El Paso, Newark] also via
“Swift Air,” and a 737, with 150 seats, notes: “Pecos [TX] will
be bused to ELP [El Paso] to catch charter flight. 1 bus will report
0800. 2 buses to report at 0800 at Delphi EIS [Delphi Emergency Intake
Site
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61538&L=28618&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudmFsbGV5Y2VudHJhbC5jb20vbmV3cy9oaHMtcmVjZWl2ZXMtMTAwLXVuYWNjb21wYW5pZWQtbWlncmFudC1jaGlsZHJlbi1pbnRvLW1pY2hpZ2FuLWZhY2lsaXR5Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=]].

The records also include a May 13, 2021, email thread
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61538&L=28619&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaGhzLXVuYWNjb21wYW5pZWQtY2hpbGRyZW4tZmxpZ2h0cy0wMzA0NC1wZ3MtNC0xMi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE]
from a redacted person at MVM Inc
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61538&L=28620&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubXZtaW5jLmNvbS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE].
to
RF1Badging@rf1.us [likely Response Force 1
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61538&L=28621&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmVzcG9uc2Vmb3JjZTEuY29tLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=]]
and others regarding an
Administration for Children and Families’ (ACF) Office of Refugee
Resettlement (ORR) transport of minors from Kay Baily Hutchison
Convention Center in Dallas on Friday, May 14, 2021, before dawn, at 3
a.m.

RF1 Badging then replies, “Please be advised that the following UCs
[Unaccompanied Children] ... does not match in our system.” He then
proceeds to list the details of nine children.

Also in this thread is an email from an individual at Culmen
International
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61538&L=28622&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY3VsbWVuLmNvbS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE]
stating that one of the minors
is “not cleared to travel.”

The records include a list
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61538&L=28623&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaGhzLXVuYWNjb21wYW5pZWQtY2hpbGRyZW4tZmxpZ2h0cy0wMzA0NC1wZy0yLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=]
for a charter of 36 children from Honduras, Guatemala, Mexico and El
Salvador. A handwritten note on the spreadsheet says: “Dallas to
Tennessee Air Charter Flight 5/14/2021.” The record notes that the
children are to be transported to these shelters: La Casa de Sidney,
Lincoln Hall Boys’ Haven, Children’s Home of Kingston,
Children’s Village Shelter, and Cayuga Center TFC. It indicates
three of the minors are “reunifications.”

(Chattanooga’s unaccompanied migrant minor housing facility, La Casa
de Sydney, was closed in 2021 after reports
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61538&L=28624&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly90ZW5uZXNzZWVjb25zZXJ2YXRpdmVuZXdzLmNvbS90YWcvbGEtY2FzYS1kZS1zaWRuZXkvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==]
of
runaways and sexual battery.)

An undated “Transfer of Custody
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61538&L=28625&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaGhzLXVuYWNjb21wYW5pZWQtY2hpbGRyZW4tZmxpZ2h0cy0wMzA0NC1wZy0xNC9d4oCdP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==
form indicates the transfer of six Guatemalan and Honduran children
from “KBH” [likely Kay Baily Hutchison Convention Center in
Dallas] to La Casa de Sidney.

These shocking documents that we forced out show the Biden
administration effectively trafficking unaccompanied alien children,
dropping them off in city after city like items for delivery. The
Biden open borders crisis is resulting in the most massive child and
human trafficking operation ever.

In a May 26, 2021, letter to HHS Secretary Xavier Becerra and
Department of Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas,
Tennessee Senators Marsha Blackburn and Bill Hagerty, along with
Tennessee Congressman Chuck Fleischmann, detailed their concerns
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61538&L=28343&F=T&]
regarding unaccompanied minors:

> We write to seek information on the Department of Health and Human
> Services (HHS) management of unaccompanied alien children (UAC) in
> federal custody and the facilities used to house them. We are
> particularly concerned about recent reports regarding the use of
> Chattanooga, Tennessee, as a central location for resettling UACs in
> the United States.

> There are media reports that, within the last week, at least four
> planes carrying UACs landed at Wilson Air Center in Chattanooga,
> Tennessee, before swiftly boarding the children onto buses and
> transporting them to multiple cities across the southeastern United
> States for apparent resettlement, with zero transparency regarding
> what was happening. For months, reports have detailed how thousands
> of children are being housed in neglectful conditions at mass
> shelters operated by HHS under a veil of secrecy. We are deeply
> troubled by the lack of transparency and accountability regarding
> the conditions that HHS is subjecting these children to.
In September 2021, we revealed
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61538&L=28341&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaGhzLWRvY3MtYWJ1c2UtbWlub3JzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=]
HHS documents
that list 33 separate incidents of alleged sexual abuse in a one-month
time period tied to unaccompanied alien children shelters.

Our investigation and lawsuits continue into the Biden invasion, and
we will keep you apprised as events in this crisis warrant.

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES AIR FORCE ACADEMY FOR CRITICAL RACE THEORY RECORDS

Our military academies are infested with Marxist dogma, and we’re
rooting it out.

Our latest action is a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) suit for
United States Air Force Academy (USAFA) training material on critical
race theory (_Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Defense_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61538&L=28596&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9kLWFpci1mb3JjZS1hY2FkZW15LWNydC1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDM1MTAvXV8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE
_(No. 1:22-cv-03510)).

We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after
the Air Force Academy, a component of Department of Defense, failed to
respond to an August 5, 2021, FOIA request for all PowerPoint
presentations used for training and/or classroom instruction
discussing critical race theory (CRT) and/or “white supremacy.” We
also requested emails about this issue for Air Force Academy senior
leadership.

This is the fourth lawsuit on the crisis at our military academies:

> On September 23, 2022, we filed a FOIA lawsuit
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61538&L=28214&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYWlyLWZvcmNlLWFjYWRlbXktY3J0LXJlY29yZHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==]
on
> behalf of Stand Together Against Racism and Radicalism in the
> Services, Inc. (STARRS) against the U.S. Department of Defense for
> Air Force Academy records regarding “systemic racism,” as well
> as records of critical race theory at the Academy.
>
> In July 2022 we sued
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61538&L=27741&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctc3Vlcy1mb3ItbmF2YWwtYWNhZGVteS1jcnQtcmVjb3Jkcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE]
> the U.S. Department of Defense for records related to the United
> States Naval Academy implementing critical race theory in the
> training of naval recruits.
>
> In June, we received records revealing critical race theory
> instruction at the U.S. Military Academy at West Point.
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61538&L=27536&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY3J0LXByb3BhZ2FuZGEtYXQtd2VzdC1wb2ludC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE]
One
> training slide contains a graphic titled “MODERN-DAY SLAVERY IN
> THE USA.” [Emphasis in original]
Marxist critical race theory and its racial division have no place at
the Air Force Academy, which is training the next generations of Air
Force leadership. And, per usual, the scandal is compounded by the
cover-up of records about the propaganda program abusing Air Force
cadets.

HACKERS TIED TO CHINA’S GOVERNMENT STEAL $20 MILLION IN COVID RELIEF
FUNDS

As Congress considers a staggering $1.7 trillion spending bill, it is
wise to look at what happens to your tax dollars in the hands of
careless bureaucrats. Consider COVID relief money. Combining insult to
injury, China hackers have made off with a huge chunk of it, as our
_Corruption Chronicles_ blog reports
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61538&L=28610&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaGFja2Vycy1zdGVhbC0yMC1taWwtaW4tY292aWQtcmVsaWVmLWZ1bmRzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=].

> Nearly a year after Judicial Watch launched an investigation into
> the theft of U.S. COVID relief funds by foreign hackers, the Secret
> Service confirms that cyber criminals connected to China’s
> government stole $20 million in benefits. This includes Small
> Business Administration (SBA) loans and unemployment insurance money
> in multiple states, according to a national news story
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61538&L=28630&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmJjbmV3cy5jb20vdGVjaC9zZWN1cml0eS9jaGluZXNlLWhhY2tlcnMtY292aWQtZnJhdWQtbWlsbGlvbnMtcmNuYTU5NjM2XXRoYXQ/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE
> identifies the perpetrators as a APT41, a hacking group based in
> Chengdu. The report cites U.S. law enforcement officials and
> cybersecurity experts who believe the multi-million-dollar theft of
> government pandemic funds by the Chinese faction “may just be the
> tip of the iceberg.”

> Back in February Judicial Watch filed a Freedom of Information Act
> (FOIA) request with the SBA as part of an ongoing investigation into
> the pervasive fraud associated with the government’s COVID-19 cash
> giveaway. Specifically, Judicial Watch requested memoranda, reports,
> email communications, investigative reports, and other
> communications or data concerning the following: COVID-19 Economic
> Injury Disaster Loan (EIDL) deposits originating from a foreign
> Internet Protocol (IP) address, account holders attempting to
> transfer funds to foreign accounts of any type and loans approved
> utilizing a fraudulent social security number. On February 23, the
> SBA acknowledged via electronic mail that it received Judicial
> Watch’s FOIA request and issued an official tracking number. So
> far no records have been provided to Judicial Watch and the SBA is
> in violation of the federal deadline—20 working days—to produce

> Most government agencies practice similar stonewalling tactics and
> Judicial Watch has repeatedly been forced to file lawsuits to compel
> the release of records. Our goal as a nonpartisan educational
> foundation is to promote transparency, accountability and integrity
> in government, politics, and the law. Pandemic relief has been a
> colossal multi-billion-dollar debacle rife with fraud and
> corruption. The problem is so bad that the Department of Justice
> (DOJ) created a COVID-19 Fraud Enforcement Task Force
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61538&L=28272&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3Yvb3BhL3ByL2F0dG9ybmV5LWdlbmVyYWwtYW5ub3VuY2VzLXRhc2stZm9yY2UtY29tYmF0LWNvdmlkLTE5LWZyYXVkP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==]
> to “enhance efforts to combat and prevent pandemic-related
> fraud.” The special unit has been quite busy prosecuting a
> multitude of scams, false statements, and money laundering related
> to pandemic relief. Earlier this year House Republicans issued a
> report
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61538&L=28269&F=T&]
> documenting 500 days of massive waste, fraud, and abuse in the
> American Rescue Plan. It includes more than $783 million in stimulus
> checks for convicted prisoners including the Boston Marathon bomber,
> $40 million to expand libraries in Delaware, $2 million for a
> Florida golf course and $16 million for electric vehicle charging
> stations in Maine and $20 million to modernize the state’s fish

> The SBA got on Judicial Watch’s radar because it has disbursed

> and nonprofits under its COVID-19 EIDL. The program provides up to
> $2 million in financial assistance to help small businesses recover

> Besides the SBA’s EIDL, the Coronavirus Aid, Relief, and Economic

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61538&L=28631&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3Yvb3BhL3ByL2ZhdGhlci1hbmQtc29uLXNlbnRlbmNlZC0xNy1taWxsaW9uLWNvdmlkLTE5LXJlbGllZi1mcmF1ZD91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=]

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61538&L=28632&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3YvdXNhby1lZHZhL3ByL2VkdmEtdGFrZXMtYWN0aW9uLWFnYWluc3QtY292aWQtMTktZnJhdWQtMjAyMj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=]
> in 26 cases of fraud schemes connected to COVID relief that
> defrauded the government out of nearly $125 million.

MERRY CHRISTMAS!

Throughout the year, Judicial Watch engages the government in court to
expose its never-ending efforts to control us. These legal battles
have at times been with the IRS and the Census Bureau, and they have
revealed the government wielding power to stay in power.

None of this is new.

The story we celebrate on December 25th – the birth of Christ –
occurred amid the ruthless imposition of government authority. In his
desire
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61538&L=28633&F=T&]
to eliminate any pretender to the throne, Caesar Augustus mandated a
census to identify anyone who might challenge him. A census was also a
first step in taxing the people.

And so, despite Mary being in her ninth month of pregnancy, she and
Joseph travelled to his home, Bethlehem, a week-long journey of
perhaps 90 miles through treacherous landscape, and it was there that
Jesus was born.

Herod, who ruled over Judea, had been given
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61538&L=28634&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmlibGVnYXRld2F5LmNvbS9ibG9nLzIwMTcvMTIvd2hvLXdhcy1oZXJvZC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE]
the title
“King of the Jews” by Rome, so when the Wise Men from the East
used that title for the Christ child they came to worship, Herod was
inflamed. He demanded that the travelers reveal the location of Jesus,
but they refused.

This infuriated him even more. It took little effort for him to order
the national massacre of all boys under two years old. Warned of this
in a dream, Joseph took Mary and Jesus to Egypt for safekeeping, and
they didn’t return until Herod was dead.

But once again a despotic ruler would influence the Christmas story.
When he heard that Herod’s son Archelaus, who had massacred
thousands of Jews, had assumed control of Judea, Joseph resettled his
family in Nazareth outside of Archelaus’ power.

These tempestuous events echo loudly in our time. We can take from
them the realization that the kings of this earth have no power over
the Truth, and, despite the tribulations of our age, we can genuinely
be of good cheer.
All of us at Judicial Watch pause from our labors in this season to
wish you a Merry Christmas!

Until next week,
